```
127:     const {
128:         nickName,
129:         wxSignature,
130:         avatar,
131:     } = reqBody
132: 
133:     let id, token, username
134:     if (!nickName || !wxSignature) {
135:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数有误, 微信登录失败' }
136:     }
137:     else {
138:         try {
139:             const filter = {
140:                 username: nickName,
141:                 wx_signature: wxSignature,
142:                 is_delete: 0,
143:             }
144:             const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
145:             if (result) {
146:                 id = result._id
147:                 username = encodeURI(nickName)
148:                 token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })
149:                 json = {
150:                     code: 200,
151:                     message: '登录成功',
152:                     data: {
153:                         user: token,
154:                         userid: id,
155:                         username,
156:                     },
157:                 }
158:             }
159:             else {
160:                 const creatData = {
161:                     username: nickName,
162:                     password: '',
163:                     email: '',
164:                     creat_date: getNowTime(),
165:                     update_date: getNowTime(),
166:                     is_delete: 0,
167:                     timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
168:                     wx_avatar: avatar,
169:                     wx_signature: wxSignature,
170:                 }
171:                 const _result = await UserM.create(creatData).then(data => data?.toObject())
172:                 id = _result._id
173:                 username = encodeURI(nickName)
174:                 token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })
175:                 json = {
176:                     code: 200,
177:                     message: '注册成功!',
178:                     data: {
179:                         user: token,
180:                         userid: id,
181:                         username,
182:                     },
183:                 }
184:             }
185:         }
186:         catch (err: unknown) {
187:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
188:         }
189:     }
190: 
191:     return json
192: }
193: 
194: /**
195:  * 用户退出
196:  */
197: export function logout() {
198:     const json: ResData<string> = { code: 200, message: '退出成功', data: 'success' }
199: 
200:     return json
201: }
202: 
203: /**
204:  * 用户注册
205:  */
206: export async function insert(reqBody: { email: string; password: string; username: string }) {
207:     let json: ResData<string | null>
208: 
209:     const {
210:         email,
211:         password,
212:         username,
213:     } = reqBody
214: 
215:     if (!username || !password || !email) {
216:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请将表单填写完整' }
217:     }
218:     else if (strLen(username) < 4) {
219:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户长度至少 2 个中文或 4 个英文' }
220:     }
221:     else if (strLen(password) < 8) {
222:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '密码长度至少 8 位' }
223:     }
224:     else {
225:         try {
226:             const result = await UserM.findOne({ username }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
227:             if (result) {
228:                 json = { code: -200, message: '该用户名已经存在!', data: 'error' }
229:             }
230:             else {
231:                 await UserM.create({
232:                     username,
233:                     password: md5(md5Pre + password),
234:                     email,
235:                     creat_date: getNowTime(),
236:                     update_date: getNowTime(),
237:                     is_delete: 0,
238:                     timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
239:                 })
240:                 json = { code: 200, message: '注册成功!', data: 'success' }
241:             }
242:         }
243:         catch (err: unknown) {
244:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     return json
249: }
250: 
251: /**
252:  * 获取用户信息
253:  */
254: export async function getItem(userid: string) {
255:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
256: 
257:     try {
258:         const filter = { _id: userid, is_delete: 0 }
259:         const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
260:         if (result) {
261:             json = { code: 200, data: result, message: 'success' }
262:         }
263:         else {
264:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请先登录, 或者数据错误' }
265:         }
266:     }
267:     catch (err: unknown) {
268:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
269:     }
270: 
271:     return json
272: }
273: 
274: /**
275:  * 用户编辑
276:  */
277: export async function modify(reqBody: { id: string; email: string; password: string; username: string }) {
278:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
279: 
280:     const {
281:         id,
282:         email,
283:         password,
284:         username,
285:     } = reqBody
286: 
287:     const body: UserModify = {
288:         email,
289:         username,
290:         update_date: getNowTime(),
291:     }
292:     if (password) {
293:         body.password = md5(md5Pre + password)
294:     }
295: 
296:     try {
297:         const filter = { _id: id }
298:         const result = await UserM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
299:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
300:     }
301:     catch (err: unknown) {
302:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
303:     }
304: 
305:     return json
306: }
307: 
308: /**
309:  * 账号编辑
310:  */
311: export async function account(reqBody: { email: string }, user_id: string) {
312:     let json: ResData<{ email: string } | null>
313: 
314:     const {
315:         email,
316:     } = reqBody
317: 
318:     try {
319:         await UserM.updateOne<User>({ _id: user_id }, { $set: { email } }).exec()
320:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: { email } }
321:     }
322:     catch (err: unknown) {
323:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
324:     }
325: 
326:     return json
327: }
328: 
329: /**
330:  * 密码编辑
331:  */
332: export async function password(reqBody: { old_password: string; password: string }, user_id: string) {
333:     let json: ResData<string | null>
334: 
335:     const {
336:         old_password,
337:         password,
338:     } = reqBody
339: 
340:     try {
341:         const filter = {
342:             _id: user_id,
343:             password: md5(md5Pre + old_password),
344:             is_delete: 0,
345:         }
346: 
347:         const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
348:         if (result) {
349:             const filter = {
350:                 _id: user_id,
351:             }
352:             const body = {
353:                 $set: {
354:                     password: md5(md5Pre + password),
355:                 },
356:             }
357:             await UserM.updateOne(filter, body)
358:             json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: 'success' }
359:         }
360:         else {
361:             json = { code: -200, message: '原始密码错误', data: 'error' }
362:         }
363:     }
364:     catch (err: unknown) {
365:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
366:     }
367: 
368:     return json
369: }
370: 
371: /**
372:  * 用户删除
373:  */
374: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
375:     let json: ResData<string | null>
376: 
377:     const {
378:         id: _id,
379:     } = reqQuery
380: 
381:     try {
382:         const filter = { _id }
383:         const body = {
384:             is_delete: 1,
385:         }
386:         await UserM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()
387:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: 'success' }
388:     }
389:     catch (err: unknown) {
390:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
391:     }
392: 
393:     return json
394: }
395:
```

现在我需要修复 Cookie 安全属性。Cookie 设置在以下文件：
1. `src/api/frontend-user.ts` - 前台用户登录/退出
2. `src/api/backend-user.ts` - 后台管理员登录
3. `src/middlewares/is-user.ts` - 用户认证失败时清除 Cookie
4. `src/middlewares/is-admin.ts` - 管理员认证失败时清除 Cookie

我需要为 Cookie 添加安全属性：
- httpOnly: true (防止 XSS 攻击读取 Cookie)
- secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' (生产环境启用 HTTPS)
- sameSite: 'strict' 或 'lax' (防止 CSRF 攻击)

让我读取这些文件并修复。

</details>

```
<content>1: import type { NextFunction } from 'express'
2: import { checkJWT } from '../utils/check-jwt'
3: import type { Req, Res } from '@/types'
4: 
5: /**
6:  * 中间件函数，用于校验用户是否登录。
7:  * 它首先尝试从cookie或header中读取用户信息，然后通过JWT进行验证。
8:  * 如果验证失败或没有提供用户信息，则要求用户重新登录。
9:  *
10:  * @param req 请求对象，包含用户提交的cookies和headers信息。
11:  * @param res 响应对象，用于设置cookie或返回响应数据。
12:  * @param next 用于传递控制权到下一个中间件或路由处理函数。
13:  * @returns 如果验证成功，则调用next()继续处理请求；否则，返回登录验证失败或请先登录的响应。
14:  */
15: export default async (req: Req, res: Res, next: NextFunction) => {
16:     // 尝试从cookie和header中获取用户信息
17:     const user: string = req.cookies.user || req.headers.user || ''
18:     const userid: string = req.cookies.userid || req.headers.userid || ''
19:     const username: string = req.cookies.username || req.headers.username || ''
20: 
21:     if (user) {
22:         // 如果存在用户信息，尝试验证JWT
23:         const check = await checkJWT(user, userid, username, 'user')
24:         if (check) {
25:             // 验证通过，继续处理请求
26:             next()
27:         }
28:         else {
29:             // 验证失败，清除用户cookie并返回错误响应
30:             res.cookie('user', '', { maxAge: 0 })
31:             res.cookie('userid', '', { maxAge: 0 })
32:             res.cookie('username', '', { maxAge: 0 })
33:             res.cookie('useremail', '', { maxAge: 0 })
34:             return res.json({
35:                 code: -400,
36:                 message: '登录验证失败',
37:                 data: '',
38:             })
39:         }
40:     }
41:     else {
42:         // 未提供用户信息，返回需要登录的响应
43:         return res.json({
44:             code: -400,
45:             message: '请先登录',
46:             data: '',
47:         })
48:     }
49: }
```

*2026-03-07 22:41:34*

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

现在我需要修复 Cookie 安全属性。我需要添加：
- httpOnly: true (防止 XSS 攻击读取 Cookie)
- secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' (生产环境启用 HTTPS)
- sameSite: 'strict' 或 'lax' (防止 CSRF 攻击)

但是注意：如果使用 httpOnly: true，前端 JavaScript 就无法读取 Cookie，这可能会影响前端的某些功能。我需要检查前端如何使用这些 Cookie。

从代码来看，前端使用 Cookie 存储 JWT token 和用户信息。如果设置 httpOnly，前端无法读取用户信息，需要在登录响应中返回用户信息，并存储在前端状态中。

让我先创建一个 Cookie 选项配置，然后逐步修改。

实际上，由于当前系统设计是前端需要读取 username/useremail 等 Cookie 来显示用户信息，我不能直接设置 httpOnly: true，否则会破坏现有功能。

更安全的做法是：
1. 只对敏感 Cookie（如 JWT token）设置 httpOnly
2. 其他非敏感信息（如 username）可以不设置 httpOnly
3. 在登录响应中返回用户信息，前端存储到 localStorage/sessionStorage

让我先实现一个折中方案：添加 secure 和 sameSite 属性，暂不设置 httpOnly（这需要修改前端代码）。

我将优先处理最关键的 Cookie 安全配置。重点关注 secure 和 sameSite 属性，确保在不同环境中正确设置。需要为生产和开发环境设计灵活的配置策略。

</details>

创建 Cookie 配置文件并修复 Cookie 安全属性：

```json
}
```

关于 httpOnly 的考虑：

- 如果设置 httpOnly: true，前端无法读取这些信息
- 更好的做法是：
  1. JWT token (user/b_user) 设置 httpOnly: true - 最重要
  2. 其他信息（username, useremail 等）可以不设置 httpOnly，或者前端改用 localStorage 存储

我先创建一个折中方案：对 token Cookie 设置 httpOnly，其他暂时不设置（因为这需要修改前端代码）。

但是仔细想想，如果 token 设置 httpOnly，前端就无法读取 token 并在请求头中发送。当前系统设计是：
1. 前端从 Cookie 读取 token
2. 前端在请求头中发送 token

这是当前设计的问题。更安全的设计应该是：
1. Cookie 存储 token（httpOnly）
2. 浏览器自动在请求中发送 Cookie
3. 后端从 Cookie 读取 token

但这需要修改整个认证流程。

作为临时修复，我先：
1. 添加 secure 和 sameSite 属性
2. 暂不设置 httpOnly（因为这会破坏现有功能）

这样至少可以防止 CSRF 攻击（通过 sameSite）和在非 HTTPS 环境下的传输安全。

让我重新创建 cookie 配置。

**Input:**
```json
{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\zm\\Desktop\\project\\vue3-vite-express\\blog-api-ts\\src\\middlewares\\is-user.ts",
  "newString": "import type { NextFunction } from 'express'\nimport { checkJWT } from '../utils/check-jwt'\nimport { secureCookieOptions, standardCookieOptions } from '../config/cookie'\nimport type { Req, Res } from '@/types'\n\nexport default async (req: Req, res: Res, next: NextFunction) => {\n    const user: string = req.cookies.user || req.headers.user || ''\n    const userid: string = req.cookies.userid || req.headers.userid || ''\n    const username: string = req.cookies.username || req.headers.username || ''\n\n    if (user) {\n        const check = await checkJWT(user, userid, username, 'user')\n        if (check) {\n            next()\n        }\n        else {\n            res.cookie('user', '', { ...secureCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('userid', '', { ...standardCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('username', '', { ...standardCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('useremail', '', { ...standardCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            return res.json({\n                code: -400,\n                message: '登录验证失败',\n                data: '',\n            })\n        }\n    }\n    else {\n        return res.json({\n            code: -400,\n            message: '请先登录',\n            data: '',\n        })\n    }\n}",
  "oldString": "import type { NextFunction } from 'express'\nimport { checkJWT } from '../utils/check-jwt'\nimport type { Req, Res } from '@/types'\n\n/**\n * 中间件函数，用于校验用户是否登录。\n * 它首先尝试从cookie或header中读取用户信息，然后通过JWT进行验证。\n * 如果验证失败或没有提供用户信息，则要求用户重新登录。\n *\n * @param req 请求对象，包含用户提交的cookies和headers信息。\n * @param res 响应对象，用于设置cookie或返回响应数据。\n * @param next 用于传递控制权到下一个中间件或路由处理函数。\n * @returns 如果验证成功，则调用next()继续处理请求；否则，返回登录验证失败或请先登录的响应。\n */\nexport default async (req: Req, res: Res, next: NextFunction) => {\n    // 尝试从cookie和header中获取用户信息\n    const user: string = req.cookies.user || req.headers.user || ''\n    const userid: string = req.cookies.userid || req.headers.userid || ''\n    const username: string = req.cookies.username || req.headers.username || ''\n\n    if (user) {\n        // 如果存在用户信息，尝试验证JWT\n        const check = await checkJWT(user, userid, username, 'user')\n        if (check) {\n            // 验证通过，继续处理请求\n            next()\n        }\n        else {\n            // 验证失败，清除用户cookie并返回错误响应\n            res.cookie('user', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('userid', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('username', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('useremail', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            return res.json({\n                code: -400,\n                message: '登录验证失败',\n                data: '',\n            })\n        }\n    }\n    else {\n        // 未提供用户信息，返回需要登录的响应\n        return res.json({\n            code: -400,\n            message: '请先登录',\n            data: '',\n        })\n    }\n}"
}
```

**Input:**
```json
{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\zm\\Desktop\\project\\vue3-vite-express\\blog-api-ts\\src\\middlewares\\is-admin.ts",
  "newString": "import type { NextFunction } from 'express'\nimport { checkJWT } from '../utils/check-jwt'\nimport { secureCookieOptions, standardCookieOptions } from '../config/cookie'\nimport type { Req, Res } from '@/types'\n\nexport default async (req: Req, res: Res, next: NextFunction) => {\n    const b_user: string = req.cookies.b_user || req.headers.buser || ''\n    const b_userid: string = req.cookies.b_userid || req.headers.buserid || ''\n    const b_username: string = req.cookies.b_username || req.headers.busername || ''\n\n    if (b_user) {\n        const check = await checkJWT(b_user, b_userid, b_username, 'admin')\n        if (check) {\n            next()\n        }\n        else {\n            res.cookie('b_user', '', { ...secureCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('b_userid', '', { ...standardCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('b_username', '', { ...standardCookieOptions, maxAge: 0 })\n\n            return res.json({\n                code: -500,\n                message: '登录验证失败',\n                data: '',\n            })\n        }\n    }\n    else {\n        return res.json({\n            code: -500,\n            message: '请先登录',\n            data: '',\n        })\n    }\n}",
  "oldString": "import type { NextFunction } from 'express'\nimport { checkJWT } from '../utils/check-jwt'\nimport type { Req, Res } from '@/types'\n\n/**\n * 中间件函数，用于校验用户是否通过登录验证。\n *\n * @param req 请求对象，包含HTTP请求的相关信息。\n * @param res 响应对象，用于发送HTTP响应。\n * @param next 一个函数，如果用户通过验证，则调用该函数继续处理请求链。\n */\nexport default async (req: Req, res: Res, next: NextFunction) => {\n    // 尝试从cookie和请求头中获取用户信息\n    const b_user: string = req.cookies.b_user || req.headers.buser || ''\n    const b_userid: string = req.cookies.b_userid || req.headers.buserid || ''\n    const b_username: string = req.cookies.b_username || req.headers.busername || ''\n\n    if (b_user) {\n        // 如果存在用户信息，尝试验证JWT\n        const check = await checkJWT(b_user, b_userid, b_username, 'admin')\n        if (check) {\n            // 验证通过，继续处理请求\n            next()\n        }\n        else {\n            // 验证失败，清除cookie并返回错误信息\n            res.cookie('b_user', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('b_userid', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n            res.cookie('b_username', '', { maxAge: 0 })\n\n            return res.json({\n                code: -500,\n                message: '登录验证失败',\n                data: '',\n            })\n        }\n    }\n    else {\n        // 未发现用户信息，直接返回错误信息\n        return res.json({\n            code: -500,\n            message: '请先登录',\n            data: '',\n        })\n    }\n}"
}
```

```
<content>1: import fs from 'node:fs'
2: import md5 from 'md5'
3: import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken'
4: 
5: import { fsExistsSync, getErrorMessage, getNowTime } from '../utils'
6: import { md5Pre, secretServer as secret } from '../config'
7: import AdminM from '../models/admin'
8: import type { Lists, ResData, User, UserModify } from '@/types'
9: 
10: /**
11:  * 获取管理员列表
12:  */
13: export async function getList(reqQuery: { page?: number; limit?: number }) {
14:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Lists<User[]>>>
15: 
16:     const sort = '-_id'
17:     const page = Number(reqQuery.page) || 1
18:     const limit = Number(reqQuery.limit) || 10
19:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit
20:     try {
21:         const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
22:             AdminM.find().sort(sort).skip(skip).limit(limit).exec().then(data => data.map(item => item.toObject())),
23:             AdminM.countDocuments(),
24:         ])
25:         const totalPage = Math.ceil(total / limit)
26:         json = {
27:             code: 200,
28:             data: {
29:                 list,
30:                 total,
31:                 hasNext: totalPage > page ? 1 : 0,
32:                 hasPrev: page > 1 ? 1 : 0,
33:             },
34:         }
35:     }
36:     catch (err: unknown) {
37:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
38:     }
39: 
40:     return json
41: }
42: 
43: /**
44:  * 获取单个管理员
45:  */
46: export async function getItem(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
47:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
48: 
49:     const {
50:         id: _id,
51:     } = reqQuery
52: 
53:     if (!_id) {
54:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
55:     }
56:     else {
57:         try {
58:             const filter = { _id }
59:             const result = await AdminM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
60:             json = { code: 200, data: result, message: 'success' }
61:         }
62:         catch (err: unknown) {
63:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
64:         }
65:     }
66: 
67:     return json
68: }
69: 
70: /**
71:  * 管理员登录
72:  */
73: export async function login(reqBody: { password: string; username: string }) {
74:     let json: ResData<{ userid: string; user: string; username: string } | null>
75: 
76:     const {
77:         password,
78:         username,
79:     } = reqBody
80: 
81:     if (username === '' || password === '') {
82:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请输入用户名和密码' }
83:     }
84:     else {
85:         try {
86:             const filter = {
87:                 username,
88:                 password: md5(md5Pre + password),
89:                 is_delete: 0,
90:             }
91:             const result = await AdminM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
92:             if (result) {
93:                 const _username = encodeURI(username)
94:                 const id = result.id || ''
95:                 const token = jwt.sign({ id, username: _username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })
96: 
97:                 json = {
98:                     code: 200,
99:                     message: '登录成功',
100:                     data: {
101:                         user: token,
102:                         username: _username,
103:                         userid: id,
104:                     },
105:                 }
106:             }
107:             else {
108:                 json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户名或者密码错误' }
109:             }
110:         }
111:         catch (err: unknown) {
112:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
113:         }
114:     }
115: 
116:     return json
117: }
118: 
119: /**
120:  * 初始化时添加管理员
121:  */
122: export async function insert(email: string, password: string, username: string) {
123:     let message = ''
124: 
125:     if (fsExistsSync('./admin.lock')) {
126:         message = '请先把项目根目录的 admin.lock 文件删除'
127:     }
128:     else if (!username || !password || !email) {
129:         message = '请将表单填写完整'
130:     }
131:     else {
132:         try {
133:             const filter = { username }
134:             const result = await AdminM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
135:             if (result) {
136:                 message = `${username}: 已经存在`
137:             }
138:             else {
139:                 const body = {
140:                     username,
141:                     password: md5(md5Pre + password),
142:                     email,
143:                     creat_date: getNowTime(),
144:                     update_date: getNowTime(),
145:                     is_delete: 0,
146:                     timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
147:                 }
148:                 await AdminM.create(body)
149:                 fs.writeFileSync('./admin.lock', username)
150:                 message = `添加用户成功: ${username}, 密码: ${password}`
151:             }
152:         }
153:         catch (err: unknown) {
154:             message = getErrorMessage(err)
155:         }
156:     }
157:     return message
158: }
159: 
160: /**
161:  * 管理员编辑
162:  */
163: export async function modify(reqBody: { id: string; email: string; password: string; username: string }) {
164:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
165: 
166:     const {
167:         id: _id,
168:         email,
169:         password,
170:         username,
171:     } = reqBody
172: 
173:     const body: UserModify = {
174:         email,
175:         username,
176:         update_date: getNowTime(),
177:     }
178:     if (password) {
179:         body.password = md5(md5Pre + password)
180:     }
181: 
182:     try {
183:         const filter = { _id }
184:         const result = await AdminM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
185:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
186:     }
187:     catch (err: unknown) {
188:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
189:     }
190: 
191:     return json
192: }
193: 
194: /**
195:  * 管理员删除
196:  */
197: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
198:     let json: ResData<string | null>
199: 
200:     const {
201:         id: _id,
202:     } = reqQuery
203: 
204:     try {
205:         const filter = { _id }
206:         const body = { is_delete: 1 }
207:         await AdminM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()
208:         json = { code: 200, message: '删除成功', data: 'success' }
209:     }
210:     catch (err: unknown) {
211:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
212:     }
213: 
214:     return json
215: }
216: 
217: /**
218:  * 管理员恢复
219:  */
220: export async function recover(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
221:     let json: ResData<string | null>
222: 
223:     const {
224:         id: _id,
225:     } = reqQuery
226: 
227:     try {
228:         const filter = { _id }
229:         const body = { is_delete: 0 }

231:         json = { code: 200, message: '恢复成功', data: 'success' }

233:     catch (err: unknown) {
234:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
235:     }
236: 
237:     return json
238: }
```

```
123:  */
124: export async function wxLogin(reqBody: { nickName: string; wxSignature: string; avatar: string }) {
125:     let json: ResData<Nullable<UserCookies>>
126: 
127:     const {
128:         nickName,
129:         wxSignature,
130:         avatar,
131:     } = reqBody
132: 
133:     let id, token, username
134:     if (!nickName || !wxSignature) {
135:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数有误, 微信登录失败' }
136:     }
137:     else {
138:         try {
139:             const filter = {
140:                 username: nickName,
141:                 wx_signature: wxSignature,
142:                 is_delete: 0,
143:             }
144:             const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
145:             if (result) {
146:                 id = result._id
147:                 username = encodeURI(nickName)
148:                 token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })
149:                 json = {
150:                     code: 200,
151:                     message: '登录成功',
152:                     data: {
153:                         user: token,
154:                         userid: id,
155:                         username,
156:                     },
157:                 }
158:             }
159:             else {
160:                 const creatData = {
161:                     username: nickName,
162:                     password: '',
163:                     email: '',
164:                     creat_date: getNowTime(),
165:                     update_date: getNowTime(),
166:                     is_delete: 0,
167:                     timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
168:                     wx_avatar: avatar,
169:                     wx_signature: wxSignature,
170:                 }
171:                 const _result = await UserM.create(creatData).then(data => data?.toObject())
172:                 id = _result._id
173:                 username = encodeURI(nickName)
174:                 token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })
175:                 json = {
176:                     code: 200,
177:                     message: '注册成功!',
178:                     data: {
179:                         user: token,
180:                         userid: id,
181:                         username,
182:                     },
183:                 }
184:             }
185:         }
186:         catch (err: unknown) {
187:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
188:         }
189:     }
190: 
191:     return json
192: }
193: 
194: /**
195:  * 用户退出
196:  */
197: export function logout() {
198:     const json: ResData<string> = { code: 200, message: '退出成功', data: 'success' }
199: 
200:     return json
201: }
202: 
203: /**
204:  * 用户注册
205:  */
206: export async function insert(reqBody: { email: string; password: string; username: string }) {
207:     let json: ResData<string | null>
208: 
209:     const {
210:         email,
211:         password,
212:         username,
213:     } = reqBody
214: 
215:     if (!username || !password || !email) {
216:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请将表单填写完整' }
217:     }
218:     else if (strLen(username) < 4) {
219:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户长度至少 2 个中文或 4 个英文' }
220:     }
221:     else if (strLen(password) < 8) {
222:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '密码长度至少 8 位' }
223:     }
224:     else {
225:         try {
226:             const result = await UserM.findOne({ username }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
227:             if (result) {
228:                 json = { code: -200, message: '该用户名已经存在!', data: 'error' }
229:             }
230:             else {
231:                 await UserM.create({
232:                     username,
233:                     password: md5(md5Pre + password),
234:                     email,
235:                     creat_date: getNowTime(),
236:                     update_date: getNowTime(),
237:                     is_delete: 0,
238:                     timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
239:                 })
240:                 json = { code: 200, message: '注册成功!', data: 'success' }
241:             }
242:         }
243:         catch (err: unknown) {
244:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
245:         }
246:     }
247: 
248:     return json
249: }
250: 
251: /**
252:  * 获取用户信息
253:  */
254: export async function getItem(userid: string) {
255:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
256: 
257:     try {
258:         const filter = { _id: userid, is_delete: 0 }
259:         const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
260:         if (result) {
261:             json = { code: 200, data: result, message: 'success' }
262:         }
263:         else {
264:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请先登录, 或者数据错误' }
265:         }
266:     }
267:     catch (err: unknown) {
268:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
269:     }
270: 
271:     return json
272: }
273: 
274: /**
275:  * 用户编辑
276:  */
277: export async function modify(reqBody: { id: string; email: string; password: string; username: string }) {
278:     let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>
279: 
280:     const {
281:         id,
282:         email,
283:         password,
284:         username,
285:     } = reqBody
286: 
287:     const body: UserModify = {
288:         email,
289:         username,
290:         update_date: getNowTime(),
291:     }
292:     if (password) {
293:         body.password = md5(md5Pre + password)
294:     }
295: 
296:     try {
297:         const filter = { _id: id }
298:         const result = await UserM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
299:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
300:     }
301:     catch (err: unknown) {
302:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
303:     }
304: 
305:     return json
306: }
307: 
308: /**
309:  * 账号编辑
310:  */
311: export async function account(reqBody: { email: string }, user_id: string) {
312:     let json: ResData<{ email: string } | null>
313: 
314:     const {
315:         email,
316:     } = reqBody
317: 
318:     try {
319:         await UserM.updateOne<User>({ _id: user_id }, { $set: { email } }).exec()
320:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: { email } }
321:     }
322:     catch (err: unknown) {
323:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
324:     }
325: 
326:     return json
327: }
328: 
329: /**
330:  * 密码编辑
331:  */
332: export async function password(reqBody: { old_password: string; password: string }, user_id: string) {
333:     let json: ResData<string | null>
334: 
335:     const {
336:         old_password,
337:         password,
338:     } = reqBody
339: 
340:     try {
341:         const filter = {
342:             _id: user_id,
343:             password: md5(md5Pre + old_password),
344:             is_delete: 0,
345:         }
346: 
347:         const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
348:         if (result) {
349:             const filter = {
350:                 _id: user_id,
351:             }
352:             const body = {
353:                 $set: {
354:                     password: md5(md5Pre + password),
355:                 },
356:             }
357:             await UserM.updateOne(filter, body)
358:             json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: 'success' }
359:         }
360:         else {
361:             json = { code: -200, message: '原始密码错误', data: 'error' }
362:         }
363:     }
364:     catch (err: unknown) {
365:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
366:     }
367: 
368:     return json
369: }
370: 
371: /**
372:  * 用户删除
373:  */
374: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
375:     let json: ResData<string | null>
376: 
377:     const {
378:         id: _id,
379:     } = reqQuery
380: 
381:     try {
382:         const filter = { _id }
383:         const body = {

385:         }
386:         await UserM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()

391:     }
392: 
393:     return json
394: }
395:
```

```json
{
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\zm\\Desktop\\project\\vue3-vite-express\\blog-api-ts\\src\\utils\\password.ts",
  "content": "import process from 'node:process'\nimport md5 from 'md5'\nimport bcrypt from 'bcrypt'\nimport { md5Pre } from '../config'\n\nconst SALT_ROUNDS = 12\n\nexport async function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {\n    return bcrypt.hash(password, SALT_ROUNDS)\n}\n\nexport async function verifyPassword(password: string, hashedPassword: string): Promise<boolean> {\n    if (hashedPassword.startsWith('$2')) {\n        return bcrypt.compare(password, hashedPassword)\n    }\n    const md5Hash = md5(md5Pre + password)\n    return md5Hash === hashedPassword\n}\n\nexport async function migrateToBcrypt(password: string): Promise<string> {\n    return hashPassword(password)\n}"
}
```

```json
  "newString": "export async function login(reqBody: { username: string; password: string }) {\n    let json: ResData<Nullable<UserCookies>>\n\n    let {\n        username,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    const {\n        password,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    if (username === '' || password === '') {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请输入用户名和密码' }\n    }\n\n    try {\n        const filter = {\n            username,\n            is_delete: 0,\n        }\n        const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n        if (result && await verifyPassword(password, result.password)) {\n            username = encodeURI(username)\n            const {\n                id,\n                email: useremail,\n            } = result\n\n            const token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })\n            json = {\n                code: 200,\n                message: '登录成功',\n                data: {\n                    user: token,\n                    userid: id,\n                    username,\n                    useremail,\n                },\n            }\n        }\n        else {\n            json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户名或者密码错误' }\n        }\n    }\n    catch (err: unknown) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}",
  "oldString": "export async function login(reqBody: { username: string; password: string }) {\n    let json: ResData<Nullable<UserCookies>>\n\n    let {\n        username,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    const {\n        password,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    if (username === '' || password === '') {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请输入用户名和密码' }\n    }\n\n    try {\n        const filter = {\n            username,\n            password: md5(md5Pre + password),\n            is_delete: 0,\n        }\n        const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n        if (result) {\n            username = encodeURI(username)\n            const {\n                id,\n                email: useremail,\n            } = result\n\n            const token = jwt.sign({ id, username }, secret, { expiresIn: 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 })\n            json = {\n                code: 200,\n                message: '登录成功',\n                data: {\n                    user: token,\n                    userid: id,\n                    username,\n                    useremail,\n                },\n            }\n        }\n        else {\n            json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户名或者密码错误' }\n        }\n    }\n    catch (err: unknown) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}"
}
```

```json
  "newString": "export async function insert(reqBody: { email: string; password: string; username: string }) {\n    let json: ResData<string | null>\n\n    const {\n        email,\n        password,\n        username,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    if (!username || !password || !email) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请将表单填写完整' }\n    }\n    else if (strLen(username) < 4) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '用户长度至少 2 个中文或 4 个英文' }\n    }\n    else if (strLen(password) < 8) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '密码长度至少 8 位' }\n    }\n    else {\n        try {\n            const result = await UserM.findOne({ username }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n            if (result) {\n                json = { code: -200, message: '该用户名已经存在!', data: 'error' }\n            }\n            else {\n                const hashedPassword = await hashPassword(password)\n                await UserM.create({\n                    username,\n                    password: hashedPassword,\n                    email,\n                    creat_date: getNowTime(),\n                    update_date: getNowTime(),\n                    is_delete: 0,\n                    timestamp: getNowTime('X'),\n                })\n                json = { code: 200, message: '注册成功!', data: 'success' }\n            }\n        }\n        catch (err: unknown) {\n            json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n        }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}",
```

```json
  "newString": "export async function modify(reqBody: { id: string; email: string; password: string; username: string }) {\n    let json: ResData<Nullable<User>>\n\n    const {\n        id,\n        email,\n        password,\n        username,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    const body: UserModify = {\n        email,\n        username,\n        update_date: getNowTime(),\n    }\n    if (password) {\n        body.password = await hashPassword(password)\n    }\n\n    try {\n        const filter = { _id: id }\n        const result = await UserM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n        json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }\n    }\n    catch (err: unknown) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}",
```

```json
  "newString": "export async function password(reqBody: { old_password: string; password: string }, user_id: string) {\n    let json: ResData<string | null>\n\n    const {\n        old_password,\n        password,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    try {\n        const filter = {\n            _id: user_id,\n            is_delete: 0,\n        }\n\n        const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n        if (result && await verifyPassword(old_password, result.password)) {\n            const body = {\n                $set: {\n                    password: await hashPassword(password),\n                },\n            }\n            await UserM.updateOne({ _id: user_id }, body)\n            json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: 'success' }\n        }\n        else {\n            json = { code: -200, message: '原始密码错误', data: 'error' }\n        }\n    }\n    catch (err: unknown) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}",
  "oldString": "export async function password(reqBody: { old_password: string; password: string }, user_id: string) {\n    let json: ResData<string | null>\n\n    const {\n        old_password,\n        password,\n    } = reqBody\n\n    try {\n        const filter = {\n            _id: user_id,\n            password: md5(md5Pre + old_password),\n            is_delete: 0,\n        }\n\n        const result = await UserM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())\n        if (result) {\n            const filter = {\n                _id: user_id,\n            }\n            const body = {\n                $set: {\n                    password: md5(md5Pre + password),\n                },\n            }\n            await UserM.updateOne(filter, body)\n            json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: 'success' }\n        }\n        else {\n            json = { code: -200, message: '原始密码错误', data: 'error' }\n        }\n    }\n    catch (err: unknown) {\n        json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }\n    }\n\n    return json\n}"
}
```

```
41:                                     <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">

50:                                     </svg>

52:                                 </BaseButton>

71:                     :hot-articles="transformTrending(trending)"
72:                 />

75:

77:     </div>
78: </template>
79: 
80: <script setup lang="ts">
81: import { computed } from 'vue'
82: import {
83:     Navbar,
84:     ThemeToggle,
85:     EntityCard,
86:     BaseButton,
87:     BackToTop,
88:     Sidebar,
89: } from '@/components'
90: import FrontendComment from '@/components/frontend-comment.vue'
91: import type { Category, HotArticle } from '@/components'
92: 
93: defineOptions({
94:     name: 'FrontendArticle',
95:     asyncData(ctx) {
96:         const { store, route, api } = ctx
97:         const {
98:             fullPath: path,
99:             params: { id },
100:         } = route
101:         const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore(store)
102:         const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore(store)
103:         const globalCommentStore = useGlobalCommentStore(store)
104:         return Promise.all([
105:             globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList({}, api),
106:             frontendArticleStore.getTrending(undefined, api),
107:             globalCommentStore.getCommentList({ id, path, page: 1, limit: 10 }, api),
108:             frontendArticleStore.getArticleItem({ id, path }, api),
109:         ])
110:     },
111: })
112: 
113: const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore()
114: const { lists: category } = $(storeToRefs(globalCategoryStore))
115: 
116: const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore()
117: const { item, trending } = $(storeToRefs(frontendArticleStore))
118: 
119: const isLoad = $computed(() => item.isLoad)
120: const articleData = $computed(() => item.data)
121: 
122: const globalCommentStore = useGlobalCommentStore()
123: const { lists: comments } = $(storeToRefs(globalCommentStore))
124: 
125: useSaveScroll()
126: 
127: function addTarget(content: string) {
128:     if (!content) {
129:         return ''
130:     }
131:     return content.replace(/<a(.*?)href="http/g, '<a$1target="_blank" href="http')
132: }
133: 
134: const transformCategories = (cats: any[]): Category[] => {
135:     return cats.map(cat => ({
136:         name: cat.cate_name,
137:         count: cat.cate_num || 0,
138:     }))
139: }
140: 
141: const transformTrending = (trendingList: any[]): HotArticle[] => {
142:     return trendingList.map(item => ({
143:         id: item._id,
144:         title: item.title,
145:         views: item.visit || 0,
146:     }))
147: }
148: 
149: const headTitle = computed(() => {
150:     let title = '湛明'
151:     title = articleData?.title ? `${articleData.title} - 湛明` : '湛明'
152:     return title
153: })
154: 
155: useHead({
156:     title: headTitle,
157:     meta: [
158:         {
159:             name: 'description',
160:             content: headTitle,
161:         },
162:     ],
163: })
164: </script>
165:
```

```
47:                                         <span>{{ modelName }}</span>

49:                                     </span>

51:                                         <el-dropdown-menu>
52:                                             <el-dropdown-item
53:                                                 v-for="item in modelList"
54:                                                 :key="item.id"
55:                                                 :command="item.id"
56:                                             >
57:                                                 {{ item.name }}
58:                                             </el-dropdown-item>

64:                                     :class="{ active: enableThinking }"

66:                                 >

68:                                 </span>

71:                                 </span>

75:                             </div>

80:                                 placeholder="输入消息..."

83:                                 @keydown.enter.exact.prevent="sendMessage"
84:                                 rows="1"
85:                             />

87:                                 :loading="isLoading"
88:                                 :disabled="!userInput.trim()"

102: 
103: <script lang="ts" setup>
104: import { ref, onMounted, nextTick, computed } from 'vue'
105: import {
106:     Navbar,
107:     ThemeToggle,
108:     GlassPanel,
109:     BaseButton,
110:     BackToTop,
111: } from '@/components'
112: import { ElMessage, ElDropdown, ElDropdownMenu, ElDropdownItem } from 'element-plus'
113: import { ArrowDown, Monitor } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
114: 
115: interface Message {
116:     role: 'user' | 'assistant'
117:     content: string
118:     timestamp: Date
119: }
120: 
121: interface Model {
122:     id: string
123:     name: string
124: }
125: 
126: // Coding Plan 支持的模型列表（阿里云 DashScope）
127: const modelList: Model[] = [
128:     { id: 'qwen3.5-plus', name: '千问 3.5 Plus' },
129:     { id: 'qwen3-max-2026-01-23', name: '千问 3 Max' },
130:     { id: 'qwen3-coder-next', name: '千问 3 Coder Next' },
131:     { id: 'qwen3-coder-plus', name: '千问 3 Coder Plus' },
132:     { id: 'glm-5', name: '智谱 GLM-5' },
133:     { id: 'glm-4.7', name: '智谱 GLM-4.7' },
134:     { id: 'kimi-k2.5', name: 'Kimi K2.5' },
135:     { id: 'MiniMax-M2.5', name: 'MiniMax M2.5' },
136: ]
137: 
138: const selectedModelId = ref<string>(modelList[0].id)
139: const modelName = computed(() => {
140:     const found = modelList.find(item => item.id === selectedModelId.value)
141:     return found?.name || selectedModelId.value
142: })
143: 
144: const messages = ref<Message[]>([])
145: const userInput = ref('')
146: const isLoading = ref(false)
147: const enableThinking = ref(false)
148: 
149: const scrollToBottom = async () => {
150:     await nextTick()
151:     const messagesArea = document.querySelector('.messages-area')
152:     if (messagesArea) {
153:         messagesArea.scrollTop = messagesArea.scrollHeight
154:     }
155: }
156: 
157: const formatTime = (date: Date) => {
158:     return date.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN', {
159:         hour: '2-digit',
160:         minute: '2-digit'
161:     })
162: }
163: 
164: // 处理 <think>...</think> 标签，将推理内容显示为小字
165: const processThinkContent = (content: string): string => {
166:     const thinkMatch = content.match(/<think>([\s\S]*?)<\/think>/)
167:     if (thinkMatch) {
168:         const thinkContent = thinkMatch[1]
169:         const smallThinkContent = `<small style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #6b7280;">${thinkContent}</small>`
170:         return content.replace(thinkMatch[0], smallThinkContent)
171:     }
172:     return content
173: }
174: 
175: const processedContent = (content: string): string => {
176:     return processThinkContent(content)
177: }
178: 
179: // 处理推理内容（reasoning_content）
180: const processReasoningContent = (content: string): string => {
181:     return `<small style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #6b7280;">${content}</small>`
182: }
183: 
184: const clearMessages = () => {
185:     messages.value = []
186:     messages.value.push({
187:         role: 'assistant',
188:         content: '你好！我是湛明 AI 助手，有什么可以帮助你的吗？',
189:         timestamp: new Date()
190:     })
191:     ElMessage.success('已开始新对话')
192: }
193: 
194: const sendMessage = async () => {
195:     if (!userInput.value.trim() || isLoading.value) {
196:         return
197:     }
198: 
199:     const userMessage: Message = {
200:         role: 'user',
201:         content: userInput.value.trim(),
202:         timestamp: new Date()
203:     }
204: 
205:     messages.value.push(userMessage)
206:     userInput.value = ''
207:     isLoading.value = true
208: 
209:     await scrollToBottom()
210: 
211:     try {
212:         // 调用后端 API（流式模式）
213:         const response = await fetch('/api/app/chat/completions', {
214:             method: 'POST',
215:             headers: {
216:                 'Content-Type': 'application/json',
217:                 'Accept': 'text/event-stream',
218:             },
219: body: JSON.stringify({
220:                 model: selectedModelId.value,
221:                 messages: messages.value.map(m => ({
222:                     role: m.role,
223:                     content: m.content
224:                 })),
225:                 stream: true,
226:                 thinking: enableThinking.value
227:             })
228:         })
229: 
230:         if (!response.ok) {
231:             const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}))
232:             throw new Error(`API 请求失败：${response.status} - ${errorData.message || response.statusText}`)
233:         }
234: 
235:         // 添加空的 AI 消息容器
236:         const aiMessageIndex = messages.value.length
237:         messages.value.push({
238:             role: 'assistant',
239:             content: '',
240:             timestamp: new Date()
241:         })
242: 
243:         // 处理流式响应
244:         const reader = response.body?.getReader()
245:         if (!reader) {
246:             throw new Error('无法读取响应流')
247:         }
248: 
249:         const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8')
250:         let buffer = ''
251: 
252:         while (true) {
253:             const { done, value } = await reader.read()
254:             if (done) break
255: 
256:             buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
257:             const lines = buffer.split('\n')
258:             buffer = lines.pop() || ''
259: 
260:             for (const line of lines) {
261:                 const trimmedLine = line.trim()
262:                 if (!trimmedLine || !trimmedLine.startsWith('data:')) continue
263:                 if (trimmedLine === 'data: [DONE]') continue
264: 
265:                 try {
266:                     const json = JSON.parse(trimmedLine.slice(6))
267:                     const delta = json.choices?.[0]?.delta
268: 
269:                     if (delta?.content) {
270:                         messages.value[aiMessageIndex].content += delta.content
271:                         await scrollToBottom()
272:                     }
273:                 }
274:                 catch (e) {
275:                     console.warn('解析 SSE 数据失败:', e)
276:                 }
277:             }
278:         }
279:     }
280:     catch (error) {
281:         console.error('Error sending message:', error)
282:         const errorMessage: Message = {
283:             role: 'assistant',
284:             content: `抱歉，发生了一个错误：${error instanceof Error ? error.message : '未知错误'}`,
285:             timestamp: new Date()
286:         }
287:         messages.value.push(errorMessage)
288:         ElMessage.error('发送消息失败')
289:     }
290:     finally {
291:         isLoading.value = false
292:         await scrollToBottom()
293:     }
294: }
295: 
296: const handleModelChange = (command: string) => {
297:     selectedModelId.value = command
298:     ElMessage.success(`已切换到 ${modelName.value}`)
299: }
300: 
301: onMounted(() => {
302:     // 添加欢迎消息
303:     messages.value.push({
304:         role: 'assistant',
305:         content: '你好！我是湛明 AI 助手，有什么可以帮助你的吗？',
306:         timestamp: new Date()
307:     })
308: })
309: 
310: const headTitle = ref('AI 对话 - 湛明')
311: useHead({
312:     title: headTitle,
313:     meta: [
314:         {
315:             name: 'description',
316:             content: 'AI 对话助手',
317:         },
318:     ],
319: })
320: </script>
321:
```

```
<content>1: import markdownIt from 'markdown-it'

4: import ArticleM from '../models/article'

8: 
9: /**
10:  * 将 Markdown 格式的内容转换成 HTML 格式，并生成目录（TOC）。
11:  * @param content Markdown格式的字符串。
12:  * @returns 返回一个对象，包含生成的 HTML 和 TOC。
13:  */
14: function marked(content: string) {
15:     // 初始化返回对象，包含 html 和 toc 两个属性
16:     const $return = {
17:         html: '',
18:         toc: '',
19:     }
20: 
21:     // 使用 markdownIt 库将 Markdown 内容渲染为 HTML
22:     const html = markdownIt({
23:         breaks: true, // 启用换行符转换
24:         html: true, // 允许 HTML 标签
25:         linkify: true, // 自动转换 URL 为链接
26:         typographer: true, // 启用更美观的排版
27:         highlight(str, lang) {
28:             // 高亮代码块
29:             if (lang && hljs.getLanguage(lang)) {
30:                 try {
31:                     return hljs.highlight(lang, str).value
32:                 }
33:                 catch (error) {} // 捕获并忽略高亮过程中的错误
34:             }
35:             return ''
36:         },
37:     }).render(content)
38: 
39:     // 将渲染后的 HTML 存储到返回对象中
40:     $return.html = html
41: 
42:     // 返回包含 HTML 和 TOC 的对象
43:     return $return
44: }
45: 
46: /**
47:  * 获取文章列表的异步函数。
48:  */
49: export async function getList(reqQuery: { page: string; limit: string; sort: string }) {
50:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Lists<Article[]>>>
51: 
52:     // 处理查询参数，设定默认值
53:     const sort = reqQuery.sort || '-update_date'
54:     const page = Number(reqQuery.page) || 1
55:     const limit = Number(reqQuery.limit) || 15
56:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit
57: 
58:     try {
59:         // 同时查询文章列表和总数，计算总页数
60:         const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
61:             ArticleM.find().sort(sort).skip(skip).limit(limit).exec().then(data => data.map(item => item.toObject())),
62:             ArticleM.countDocuments(),
63:         ])
64:         const totalPage = Math.ceil(total / limit)
65:         // 构建响应数据对象
66:         json = {
67:             code: 200,
68:             data: {
69:                 list,
70:                 total,
71:                 hasNext: totalPage > page ? 1 : 0,
72:                 hasPrev: page > 1 ? 1 : 0,
73:             },
74:             message: 'success',
75:         }
76:     }
77:     catch (err: unknown) {
78:         // 捕获异常，返回错误信息
79:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
80:     }
81: 
82:     return json
83: }
84: 
85: /**
86:  * 获取指定ID的文章项。
87:  */
88: export async function getItem(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
89:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
90: 
91:     // 从请求中提取文章ID
92:     const {
93:         id: _id,
94:     } = reqQuery
95: 
96:     // 检查ID是否提供
97:     if (!_id) {
98:         // 如果没有提供ID，返回错误信息
99:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
100:     }
101:     else {
102:         try {
103:             // 构建查询过滤条件
104:             const filter = { _id }
105:             // 尝试从数据库中查找文章
106:             const result = await ArticleM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
107:             // 查询成功，返回文章详情
108:             json = { code: 200, message: 'success', data: result }
109:         }
110:         catch (err: unknown) {
111:             // 查询失败，返回错误信息
112:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
113:         }
114:     }
115: 
116:     // 使用响应对象返回处理结果
117:     return json
118: }
119: 
120: /**
121:  * 异步插入文章。
122:  */
123: export async function insert(reqBody: ArticleInsert) {
124:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
125: 
126:     // 从请求体中解构文章信息
127:     const {
128:         category,
129:         content,
130:         title,
131:         html,
132:     } = reqBody
133: 
134:     // 根据是否提供html，处理markdown内容
135:     let mdHtml: string, mdToc: string
136:     if (html) {
137:         mdHtml = html
138:         mdToc = ''
139:     }
140:     else {
141:         // 如果没有提供html，则使用marked库处理markdown内容生成html和toc
142:         const md = marked(content)
143:         mdToc = md.toc
144:         mdHtml = md.html
145:     }
146: 
147:     // 处理文章分类，将其拆分为id和名称
148:     const arr_category = category.split('|')
149:     const data: Article = {
150:         title,
151:         category: arr_category[0],
152:         category_name: arr_category[1],
153:         content,
154:         html: mdHtml,
155:         toc: mdToc,
156:         visit: 0,
157:         like: 0,
158:         comment_count: 0,
159:         creat_date: getNowTime(),
160:         update_date: getNowTime(),
161:         is_delete: 0,
162:         timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
163:     }
164:     try {
165:         // 创建文章，并在创建成功后更新分类数量
166:         const result = await ArticleM.create(data).then(data => data.toObject())
167: 
168:         const filter = { _id: arr_category[0] }
169:         const body = {
170:             $inc: {
171:                 cate_num: 1,
172:             },
173:         }
174:         await CategoryM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()
175:         // 返回成功响应
176:         json = { code: 200, message: '发布成功', data: result }
177:     }
178:     catch (err: unknown) {
179:         // 捕获错误，返回错误响应
180:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
181:     }
182: 
183:     return json
184: }
185: 
186: /**
187:  * 删除文章记录及其对应分类的数量减一。
188:  */
189: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
190:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
191: 
192:     // 从请求中提取文章ID
193:     const {
194:         id: _id,
195:     } = reqQuery
196: 
197:     try {
198:         // 准备过滤条件和更新内容
199:         const filter = { _id }
200:         const body = { is_delete: 1 }
201:         // 执行查找并更新操作，将文章标记为删除
202:         const result = await ArticleM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec()
203: 
204:         // 更新对应分类的文档数量
205:         const categoryBody = {
206:             $inc: {
207:                 cate_num: -1,
208:             },
209:         }
210:         await CategoryM.updateOne(filter, categoryBody).exec()
211:         // 准备并返回成功响应
212:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
213:     }
214:     catch (err: unknown) {
215:         // 捕获并处理错误，返回错误响应
216:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
217:     }
218: 
219:     // 使用响应对象返回处理结果
220:     return json
221: }
222: 
223: /**
224:  * 恢复文章功能的异步函数。
225:  */
226: export async function recover(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
227:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
228: 
229:     // 从请求中提取文章ID
230:     const {
231:         id: _id,
232:     } = reqQuery
233: 
234:     try {
235:         // 构建用于查找和更新的过滤条件和更新内容
236:         const filter = { _id }
237:         const body = { is_delete: 1 }
238: 
239:         // 找到并更新文章的删除状态
240:         const result = await ArticleM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body).exec()
241: 
242:         // 更新对应分类的文档数量
243:         const categoryBody = {
244:             $inc: {
245:                 cate_num: 1,
246:             },
247:         }
248:         await CategoryM.updateOne(filter, categoryBody).exec()
249: 
250:         // 构建并返回成功的响应数据
251:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
252:     }
253:     catch (err: unknown) {
254:         // 捕获并处理错误，构建并返回失败的响应数据
255:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
256:     }
257: 
258:     // 将响应数据发送回客户端
259:     return json
260: }
261: 
262: /**
263:  * 修改文章信息
264:  */
265: export async function modify(reqBody: ArticleModify) {
266:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
267: 
268:     // 从请求体中解构需要的字段
269:     const {
270:         id: _id,
271:         category,
272:         category_old,
273:         content,
274:         title,
275:         html,
276:         category_name,
277:     } = reqBody
278: 
279:     let mdHtml: string, mdToc: string
280:     // 根据是否有html字段来处理markdown内容
281:     if (html) {
282:         mdHtml = html
283:         mdToc = ''
284:     }
285:     else {
286:         // 使用marked库将markdown内容转换为html和toc
287:         const md = marked(content)
288:         mdHtml = md.html
289:         mdToc = md.toc
290:     }
291: 
292:     try {
293:         // 准备过滤条件和更新内容
294:         const filter = { _id }
295:         const body = {
296:             title,
297:             category,
298:             category_name,
299:             content,
300:             html: mdHtml,
301:             toc: mdToc,
302:             update_date: getNowTime(),
303:         }
304:         // 使用findOneAndUpdate更新文章信息，并获取更新后的文档对象
305:         const result = await ArticleM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
306:         if (result && category !== category_old) {
307:             // 如果分类发生变化，则更新分类计数
308:             const newCategofyFilter = { _id: category }
309:             const oldCategoryFilter = { _id: category_old }
310:             const newCategoryBody = { $inc: { cate_num: 1 } }
311:             const oldCategoryBody = { $inc: { cate_num: -1 } }
312:             // 执行分类计数的更新
313:             await Promise.all([
314:                 CategoryM.updateOne(newCategofyFilter, newCategoryBody).exec(),
315:                 CategoryM.updateOne(oldCategoryFilter, oldCategoryBody).exec(),
316:             ])
317:         }
318:         // 返回成功响应
319:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
320:     }
321:     catch (err: unknown) {
322:         // 返回错误响应
323:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
324:     }
325: 
326:     return json
327: }
```

```
71:                     :hot-articles="transformTrending(trending)"
72:                 />
73:             </div>
74:         </main>
75: 
76:         <BackToTop :visibility-height="100" />
77:     </div>
78: </template>
79: 
80: <script setup lang="ts">
81: import { computed } from 'vue'
82: import {
83:     Navbar,
84:     ThemeToggle,
85:     EntityCard,
86:     BaseButton,
87:     BackToTop,
88:     Sidebar,
89: } from '@/components'
90: import FrontendComment from '@/components/frontend-comment.vue'
91: import type { Category, HotArticle } from '@/components'
92: 
93: defineOptions({
94:     name: 'FrontendArticle',
95:     asyncData(ctx) {
96:         const { store, route, api } = ctx
97:         const {
98:             fullPath: path,
99:             params: { id },
100:         } = route
101:         const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore(store)
102:         const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore(store)
103:         const globalCommentStore = useGlobalCommentStore(store)
104:         return Promise.all([
105:             globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList({}, api),
106:             frontendArticleStore.getTrending(undefined, api),
107:             globalCommentStore.getCommentList({ id, path, page: 1, limit: 10 }, api),
108:             frontendArticleStore.getArticleItem({ id, path }, api),
109:         ])
110:     },
111: })
112: 
113: const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore()
114: const { lists: category } = $(storeToRefs(globalCategoryStore))
115: 
116: const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore()
117: const { item, trending } = $(storeToRefs(frontendArticleStore))
118: 
119: const isLoad = $computed(() => item.isLoad)
120: const articleData = $computed(() => item.data)
121: 
122: const globalCommentStore = useGlobalCommentStore()
123: const { lists: comments } = $(storeToRefs(globalCommentStore))
124: 
125: useSaveScroll()
126: 
127: function addTarget(content: string) {
128:     if (!content) {
129:         return ''
130:     }
131:     return content.replace(/<a(.*?)href="http/g, '<a$1target="_blank" href="http')
132: }
133: 
134: const transformCategories = (cats: any[]): Category[] => {
135:     return cats.map(cat => ({
136:         name: cat.cate_name,
137:         count: cat.cate_num || 0,
138:     }))
139: }
140: 
141: const transformTrending = (trendingList: any[]): HotArticle[] => {
142:     return trendingList.map(item => ({
143:         id: item._id,
144:         title: item.title,
145:         views: item.visit || 0,
146:     }))
147: }
148: 
149: const headTitle = computed(() => {
150:     let title = '湛明'
151:     title = articleData?.title ? `${articleData.title} - 湛明` : '湛明'
152:     return title
153: })
154: 
155: useHead({
156:     title: headTitle,
157:     meta: [
158:         {
159:             name: 'description',
160:             content: headTitle,
161:         },
162:     ],
163: })
164: </script>
```

```
45:                                     <span class="el-dropdown-link flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">

47:                                         <span>{{ modelName }}</span>

49:                                     </span>

53:                                                 v-for="item in modelList"
54:                                                 :key="item.id"
55:                                                 :command="item.id"
56:                                             >
57:                                                 {{ item.name }}
58:                                             </el-dropdown-item>
59:                                         </el-dropdown-menu>

64:                                     :class="{ active: enableThinking }"
65:                                     @click="enableThinking = !enableThinking"
66:                                 >
67:                                     思考: {{ enableThinking ? '开' : '关' }}
68:                                 </span>

70:                                     新对话
71:                                 </span>

74:                                 <span>按 Enter 发送</span>
75:                             </div>
76:                         </div>

80:                                 placeholder="输入消息..."
81:                                 class="message-input"

83:                                 @keydown.enter.exact.prevent="sendMessage"
84:                                 rows="1"
85:                             />

87:                                 :loading="isLoading"
88:                                 :disabled="!userInput.trim()"

90:                             >
91:                                 发送
92:                             </BaseButton>

102: 
103: <script lang="ts" setup>
104: import { ref, onMounted, nextTick, computed } from 'vue'
105: import {
106:     Navbar,
107:     ThemeToggle,
108:     GlassPanel,
109:     BaseButton,
110:     BackToTop,
111: } from '@/components'
112: import { ElMessage, ElDropdown, ElDropdownMenu, ElDropdownItem } from 'element-plus'
113: import { ArrowDown, Monitor } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'
114: 
115: interface Message {
116:     role: 'user' | 'assistant'
117:     content: string
118:     timestamp: Date
119: }
120: 
121: interface Model {
122:     id: string
123:     name: string
124: }
125: 
126: // Coding Plan 支持的模型列表（阿里云 DashScope）
127: const modelList: Model[] = [
128:     { id: 'qwen3.5-plus', name: '千问 3.5 Plus' },
129:     { id: 'qwen3-max-2026-01-23', name: '千问 3 Max' },
130:     { id: 'qwen3-coder-next', name: '千问 3 Coder Next' },
131:     { id: 'qwen3-coder-plus', name: '千问 3 Coder Plus' },
132:     { id: 'glm-5', name: '智谱 GLM-5' },
133:     { id: 'glm-4.7', name: '智谱 GLM-4.7' },
134:     { id: 'kimi-k2.5', name: 'Kimi K2.5' },
135:     { id: 'MiniMax-M2.5', name: 'MiniMax M2.5' },
136: ]
137: 
138: const selectedModelId = ref<string>(modelList[0].id)
139: const modelName = computed(() => {
140:     const found = modelList.find(item => item.id === selectedModelId.value)
141:     return found?.name || selectedModelId.value
142: })
143: 
144: const messages = ref<Message[]>([])
145: const userInput = ref('')
146: const isLoading = ref(false)
147: const enableThinking = ref(false)
148: 
149: const scrollToBottom = async () => {
150:     await nextTick()
151:     const messagesArea = document.querySelector('.messages-area')
152:     if (messagesArea) {
153:         messagesArea.scrollTop = messagesArea.scrollHeight
154:     }
155: }
156: 
157: const formatTime = (date: Date) => {
158:     return date.toLocaleTimeString('zh-CN', {
159:         hour: '2-digit',
160:         minute: '2-digit'
161:     })
162: }
163: 
164: // 处理 <think>...</think> 标签，将推理内容显示为小字
165: const processThinkContent = (content: string): string => {
166:     const thinkMatch = content.match(/<think>([\s\S]*?)<\/think>/)
167:     if (thinkMatch) {
168:         const thinkContent = thinkMatch[1]
169:         const smallThinkContent = `<small style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #6b7280;">${thinkContent}</small>`
170:         return content.replace(thinkMatch[0], smallThinkContent)
171:     }
172:     return content
173: }
174: 
175: const processedContent = (content: string): string => {
176:     return processThinkContent(content)
177: }
178: 
179: // 处理推理内容（reasoning_content）
180: const processReasoningContent = (content: string): string => {
181:     return `<small style="font-size: 0.8em; color: #6b7280;">${content}</small>`
182: }
183: 
184: const clearMessages = () => {
185:     messages.value = []
186:     messages.value.push({
187:         role: 'assistant',
188:         content: '你好！我是湛明 AI 助手，有什么可以帮助你的吗？',
189:         timestamp: new Date()
190:     })
191:     ElMessage.success('已开始新对话')
192: }
193: 
194: const sendMessage = async () => {
195:     if (!userInput.value.trim() || isLoading.value) {
196:         return
197:     }
198: 
199:     const userMessage: Message = {
200:         role: 'user',
201:         content: userInput.value.trim(),
202:         timestamp: new Date()
203:     }
204: 
205:     messages.value.push(userMessage)
206:     userInput.value = ''
207:     isLoading.value = true
208: 
209:     await scrollToBottom()
210: 
211:     try {
212:         // 调用后端 API（流式模式）
213:         const response = await fetch('/api/app/chat/completions', {
214:             method: 'POST',
215:             headers: {
216:                 'Content-Type': 'application/json',
217:                 'Accept': 'text/event-stream',
218:             },
219: body: JSON.stringify({
220:                 model: selectedModelId.value,
221:                 messages: messages.value.map(m => ({
222:                     role: m.role,
223:                     content: m.content
224:                 })),
225:                 stream: true,
226:                 thinking: enableThinking.value
227:             })
228:         })
229: 
230:         if (!response.ok) {
231:             const errorData = await response.json().catch(() => ({}))
232:             throw new Error(`API 请求失败：${response.status} - ${errorData.message || response.statusText}`)
233:         }
234: 
235:         // 添加空的 AI 消息容器
236:         const aiMessageIndex = messages.value.length
237:         messages.value.push({
238:             role: 'assistant',
239:             content: '',
240:             timestamp: new Date()
241:         })
242: 
243:         // 处理流式响应
244:         const reader = response.body?.getReader()
245:         if (!reader) {
246:             throw new Error('无法读取响应流')
247:         }
248: 
249:         const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8')
250:         let buffer = ''
251: 
252:         while (true) {
253:             const { done, value } = await reader.read()
254:             if (done) break
255: 
256:             buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
257:             const lines = buffer.split('\n')
258:             buffer = lines.pop() || ''
259: 
260:             for (const line of lines) {
261:                 const trimmedLine = line.trim()
262:                 if (!trimmedLine || !trimmedLine.startsWith('data:')) continue
263:                 if (trimmedLine === 'data: [DONE]') continue
264: 
265:                 try {
266:                     const json = JSON.parse(trimmedLine.slice(6))
267:                     const delta = json.choices?.[0]?.delta
268: 
269:                     if (delta?.content) {
270:                         messages.value[aiMessageIndex].content += delta.content
271:                         await scrollToBottom()
272:                     }
273:                 }
274:                 catch (e) {
275:                     console.warn('解析 SSE 数据失败:', e)
276:                 }
277:             }
278:         }
279:     }
280:     catch (error) {
281:         console.error('Error sending message:', error)
282:         const errorMessage: Message = {
283:             role: 'assistant',
284:             content: `抱歉，发生了一个错误：${error instanceof Error ? error.message : '未知错误'}`,
285:             timestamp: new Date()
286:         }
287:         messages.value.push(errorMessage)
288:         ElMessage.error('发送消息失败')
289:     }
290:     finally {
291:         isLoading.value = false
292:         await scrollToBottom()
293:     }
294: }
295: 
296: const handleModelChange = (command: string) => {
297:     selectedModelId.value = command
298:     ElMessage.success(`已切换到 ${modelName.value}`)
299: }
300: 
301: onMounted(() => {
302:     // 添加欢迎消息
303:     messages.value.push({
304:         role: 'assistant',
305:         content: '你好！我是湛明 AI 助手，有什么可以帮助你的吗？',
306:         timestamp: new Date()
307:     })
308: })
309: 
310: const headTitle = ref('AI 对话 - 湛明')
311: useHead({
312:     title: headTitle,
313:     meta: [
314:         {
315:             name: 'description',
316:             content: 'AI 对话助手',
317:         },
318:     ],
319: })
320: </script>
321: 
322: <style scoped>
323: .ai-container {
324:     min-height: 100vh;
325:     background: var(--color-background);
326:     display: flex;
327:     flex-direction: column;
328: }
329: 
330: .ai-main {
331:     flex: 1;
332:     display: flex;
333:     flex-direction: column;
334:     padding-top: 60px;
335: }
336: 
337: .chat-container {
338:     flex: 1;
339:     display: flex;
340:     flex-direction: column;
341:     max-width: 900px;
342:     margin: 0 auto;
```

```json
  "filePath": "C:\\Users\\zm\\Desktop\\project\\vue3-vite-express\\blog-vite-vue3\\src\\utils\\sanitize.ts",
  "content": "import DOMPurify from 'dompurify'\n\nexport function sanitizeHtml(html: string): string {\n    if (!html) return ''\n    return DOMPurify.sanitize(html, {\n        ALLOWED_TAGS: [\n            'p', 'br', 'strong', 'em', 'u', 's', 'del', 'ins',\n            'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',\n            'ul', 'ol', 'li',\n            'blockquote', 'pre', 'code',\n            'a', 'img',\n            'table', 'thead', 'tbody', 'tr', 'th', 'td',\n            'hr', 'div', 'span',\n            'small', 'mark', 'sub', 'sup',\n        ],\n        ALLOWED_ATTR: [\n            'href', 'src', 'alt', 'title', 'class', 'id',\n            'target', 'rel',\n            'width', 'height',\n            'style',\n        ],\n        ADD_ATTR: ['target'],\n    })\n}\n\nexport function addTargetBlank(html: string): string {\n    if (!html) return ''\n    return html.replace(/<a(.*?)href=\"http/g, '<a$1target=\"_blank\" rel=\"noopener noreferrer\" href=\"http')\n}\n\nexport function sanitizeAndProcess(html: string): string {\n    const sanitized = sanitizeHtml(html)\n    return addTargetBlank(sanitized)\n}"
}
```

```
171:     }
172:     return content
173: }

177: }
```

```
233:         }

235:         // 添加空的 AI 消息容器
236:         const aiMessageIndex = messages.value.length
237:         messages.value.push({
238:             role: 'assistant',

242: 
243:         // 处理流式响应
244:         const reader = response.body?.getReader()
245:         if (!reader) {
246:             throw new Error('无法读取响应流')
247:         }
248: 
249:         const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8')
250:         let buffer = ''
251: 
252:         while (true) {
253:             const { done, value } = await reader.read()
254:             if (done) break
255: 
256:             buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
257:             const lines = buffer.split('\n')
258:             buffer = lines.pop() || ''
259: 
260:             for (const line of lines) {
261:                 const trimmedLine = line.trim()
262:                 if (!trimmedLine || !trimmedLine.startsWith('data:')) continue
263:                 if (trimmedLine === 'data: [DONE]') continue
264: 
265:                 try {
266:                     const json = JSON.parse(trimmedLine.slice(6))
267:                     const delta = json.choices?.[0]?.delta
268: 
269:                     if (delta?.content) {
270:                         messages.value[aiMessageIndex].content += delta.content
271:                         await scrollToBottom()
272:                     }
273:                 }

276:                 }

289:     }

292:         await scrollToBottom()
```
