9: 
10: /**
11:  * 将 Markdown 格式的内容转换成 HTML 格式，并生成目录（TOC）。
12:  * @param content Markdown格式的字符串。
13:  * @returns 返回一个对象，包含生成的 HTML 和 TOC。
14:  */
15: function marked(content: string) {
16:     // 初始化返回对象，包含 html 和 toc 两个属性
17:     const $return = {
18:         html: '',
19:         toc: '',
20:     }
21: 
22:     // 使用 markdownIt 库将 Markdown 内容渲染为 HTML
23:     const html = markdownIt({
24:         breaks: true, // 启用换行符转换
25:         html: true, // 允许 HTML 标签
26:         linkify: true, // 自动转换 URL 为链接
27:         typographer: true, // 启用更美观的排版
28:         highlight(str, lang) {
29:             // 高亮代码块
30:             if (lang && hljs.getLanguage(lang)) {
31:                 try {
32:                     return hljs.highlight(lang, str).value
33:                 }
34:                 catch (error) {} // 捕获并忽略高亮过程中的错误
35:             }
36:             return ''
37:         },
38:     }).render(content)
39: 
40:     // 将渲染后的 HTML 存储到返回对象中
41:     $return.html = html
42: 
43:     // 返回包含 HTML 和 TOC 的对象
44:     return $return
45: }
46: 
47: /**
48:  * 获取文章列表的异步函数。
49:  */
50: export async function getList(reqQuery: { page: string; limit: string; sort: string }) {
51:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Lists<Article[]>>>
52: 
53:     // 处理查询参数，设定默认值
54:     const sort = reqQuery.sort || '-update_date'
55:     const page = Number(reqQuery.page) || 1
56:     const limit = Number(reqQuery.limit) || 15
57:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit
58: 
59:     try {
60:         // 同时查询文章列表和总数，计算总页数
61:         const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
62:             ArticleM.find().sort(sort).skip(skip).limit(limit).exec().then(data => data.map(item => item.toObject())),
63:             ArticleM.countDocuments(),
64:         ])
65:         const totalPage = Math.ceil(total / limit)
66:         // 构建响应数据对象
67:         json = {
68:             code: 200,
69:             data: {
70:                 list,
71:                 total,
72:                 hasNext: totalPage > page ? 1 : 0,
73:                 hasPrev: page > 1 ? 1 : 0,
74:             },
75:             message: 'success',
76:         }
77:     }
78:     catch (err: unknown) {
79:         // 捕获异常，返回错误信息
80:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
81:     }
82: 
83:     return json
84: }
85: 
86: /**
87:  * 获取指定ID的文章项。
88:  */
89: export async function getItem(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
90:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
91: 
92:     const {
93:         id: _id,
94:     } = reqQuery
95: 
96:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
97:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
98:     }
99:     else {
100:         try {
101:             // 构建查询过滤条件
102:             const filter = { _id }
103:             // 尝试从数据库中查找文章
104:             const result = await ArticleM.findOne(filter).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
105:             // 查询成功，返回文章详情
106:             json = { code: 200, message: 'success', data: result }
107:         }
108:         catch (err: unknown) {
109:             // 查询失败，返回错误信息
110:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
111:         }
112:     }
113: 
114:     // 使用响应对象返回处理结果
115:     return json
116: }
117: 
118: /**
119:  * 异步插入文章。
120:  */
121: export async function insert(reqBody: ArticleInsert) {
122:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
123: 
124:     // 从请求体中解构文章信息
125:     const {
126:         category,
127:         content,
128:         title,
129:         html,
130:     } = reqBody
131: 
132:     // 根据是否提供html，处理markdown内容
133:     let mdHtml: string, mdToc: string
134:     if (html) {
135:         mdHtml = html
136:         mdToc = ''
137:     }
138:     else {
139:         // 如果没有提供html，则使用marked库处理markdown内容生成html和toc
140:         const md = marked(content)
141:         mdToc = md.toc
142:         mdHtml = md.html
143:     }
144: 
145:     // 处理文章分类，将其拆分为id和名称
146:     const arr_category = category.split('|')
147:     const data: Article = {
148:         title,
149:         category: arr_category[0],
150:         category_name: arr_category[1],
151:         content,
152:         html: mdHtml,
153:         toc: mdToc,
154:         visit: 0,
155:         like: 0,
156:         comment_count: 0,
157:         creat_date: getNowTime(),
158:         update_date: getNowTime(),
159:         is_delete: 0,
160:         timestamp: getNowTime('X'),
161:     }
162:     try {
163:         // 创建文章，并在创建成功后更新分类数量
164:         const result = await ArticleM.create(data).then(data => data.toObject())
165: 
166:         const filter = { _id: arr_category[0] }
167:         const body = {
168:             $inc: {
169:                 cate_num: 1,
170:             },
171:         }
172:         await CategoryM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()
173:         // 返回成功响应
174:         json = { code: 200, message: '发布成功', data: result }
175:     }
176:     catch (err: unknown) {
177:         // 捕获错误，返回错误响应
178:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
179:     }
180: 
181:     return json
182: }
183: 
184: /**
185:  * 删除文章记录及其对应分类的数量减一。
186:  */
187: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
188:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
189: 
190:     const {
191:         id: _id,
192:     } = reqQuery
193: 
194:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
195:         return { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
196:     }
197:

199:         const filter = { _id }

202:         const result = await ArticleM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec()
203: 
204:         // 更新对应分类的文档数量
205:         const categoryBody = {
206:             $inc: {
207:                 cate_num: -1,
208:             },
209:         }
210:         await CategoryM.updateOne(filter, categoryBody).exec()
211:         // 准备并返回成功响应
212:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
213:     }
214:     catch (err: unknown) {
215:         // 捕获并处理错误，返回错误响应
216:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
217:     }
218: 
219:     // 使用响应对象返回处理结果
220:     return json
221: }
222: 
223: /**
224:  * 恢复文章功能的异步函数。
225:  */
226: export async function recover(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
227:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
228: 
229:     const {
230:         id: _id,
231:     } = reqQuery
232: 
233:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
234:         return { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
235:     }

238:         const filter = { _id }

240:

242:

244:             $inc: {
245:                 cate_num: 1,
246:             },
247:         }

249:

251:     }
252:     catch (err: unknown) {
253:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
254:     }
255:

259: /**
260:  * 修改文章信息
261:  */
262: export async function modify(reqBody: ArticleModify) {
263:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
264: 
265:     const {
266:         id: _id,
267:         category,
268:         category_old,
269:         content,
270:         title,
271:         html,
272:         category_name,
273:     } = reqBody
274: 
275:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
276:         return { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
277:     }
278: 
279:     let mdHtml: string, mdToc: string
280:     if (html) {
281:         mdHtml = html
282:         mdToc = ''
283:     }
284:     else {
285:         const md = marked(content)
286:         mdHtml = md.html
287:         mdToc = md.toc
288:     }
289: 
290:     try {
291:         const filter = { _id }
292:         const body = {
293:             title,
294:             category,
295:             category_name,
296:             content,
297:             html: mdHtml,
298:             toc: mdToc,
299:             update_date: getNowTime(),
300:         }
301:         // 使用findOneAndUpdate更新文章信息，并获取更新后的文档对象
302:         const result = await ArticleM.findOneAndUpdate(filter, body, { new: true }).exec().then(data => data?.toObject())
303:         if (result && category !== category_old) {
304:             // 如果分类发生变化，则更新分类计数
305:             const newCategofyFilter = { _id: category }
306:             const oldCategoryFilter = { _id: category_old }
307:             const newCategoryBody = { $inc: { cate_num: 1 } }
308:             const oldCategoryBody = { $inc: { cate_num: -1 } }
309:             // 执行分类计数的更新
310:             await Promise.all([
311:                 CategoryM.updateOne(newCategofyFilter, newCategoryBody).exec(),
312:                 CategoryM.updateOne(oldCategoryFilter, oldCategoryBody).exec(),
313:             ])
314:         }
315:         // 返回成功响应
316:         json = { code: 200, message: '更新成功', data: result }
317:     }
318:     catch (err: unknown) {
319:         // 返回错误响应
320:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
321:     }
322: 
323:     return json
324: }

6: function escapeRegex(str: string): string {
7:     return str.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')
8: }
9: 
10: function replaceHtmlTag(html: string): string {
11:     if (!html) return ''
12:     return html
13:         .replace(/<script\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/script>)<[^<]*)*<\/script>/gi, '')
14:         .replace(/<script\b[^>]*>/gi, '')
15:         .replace(/<\/script>/gi, '')
16:         .replace(/javascript:/gi, '')
17:         .replace(/on\w+\s*=/gi, 'data-blocked=')
18:         .replace(/\$'/g, '$ \'')
19:         .replace(/\$`/g, '$ `')
20: }
21: 
22: interface ArticleSearch {
23:     is_delete: number
24:     category?: string
25:     title?: {
26:         $regex: RegExp
27:     }
28: }
29: 
30: /**
31:  * 前台浏览时, 获取文章列表
32:  */
33: export async function getList(reqQuery: ReqListQuery, user_id: string) {
34:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Lists<Article[]>>>
35: 
36:     const {
37:         by,
38:         id,
39:         key,
40:     } = reqQuery
41: 
42:     const page = Number(reqQuery.page) || 1
43:     const limit = Number(reqQuery.limit) || 10
44: 
45:     const payload: ArticleSearch = {
46:         is_delete: 0,
47:     }
48:     const skip = (page - 1) * limit
49:     if (id) {
50:         payload.category = id
51:     }
52: 
53: if (key) {
54:         const escapedKey = escapeRegex(key)
55:         const reg = new RegExp(escapedKey, 'i')
56:         payload.title = { $regex: reg }
57:     }
58:     let sort = '-update_date'
59:     if (by) {
60:         sort = `-${by}`
61:     }
62: 
63:     const filds = 'title content category category_name visit like likes comment_count creat_date update_date is_delete timestamp'
64: 
65:     try {
66:         const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
67:             ArticleM.find(payload, filds).sort(sort).skip(skip).limit(limit).exec().then(data => data.map(item => item.toObject())),
68:             ArticleM.countDocuments(payload),
69:         ])
70:         const totalPage = Math.ceil(total / limit)
71:         json = {
72:             code: 200,
73:             data: {
74:                 list: [],
75:                 total,
76:                 hasNext: totalPage > page ? 1 : 0,
77:                 hasPrev: page > 1 ? 1 : 0,
78:             },
79:             message: 'success',
80:         }
81:         if (user_id) {
82:             json.data!.list = list.map((item): Article => ({
83:                 ...item,
84:                 like_status: item.likes && item.likes.includes(user_id),
85:                 content: `${replaceHtmlTag(item.content).substring(0, 500)}...`,
86:                 likes: [],
87:             }))
88:         }
89:         else {
90:             json.data!.list = list.map((item): Article => ({
91:                 ...item,
92:                 like_status: false,
93:                 content: `${replaceHtmlTag(item.content).substring(0, 500)}...`,
94:                 likes: [],
95:             }))
96:         }
97:     }
98:     catch (err: unknown) {
99:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
100:     }
101: 
102:     return json
103: }
104: 
105: /**
106:  * 前台浏览时, 获取单篇文章
107:  */
108: export async function getItem(reqQuery: { id: string }, user_id: Nullable<string>) {
109:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Article>>
110: 
111:     const {
112:         id: _id,
113:     } = reqQuery
114: 
115:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {

5: import type { Comment, Lists, ReqListQuery, ResData } from '@/types'
6: 
7: export async function insert(reqBody: { id: string; content: string }, userid: string) {
8:     let json: ResData<Comment | null>
9: 
10:     const {
11:         id: _id,
12:         content,
13:     } = reqBody
14: 
15:     const creat_date = getNowTime()
16:     const timestamp = getNowTime('X')
17:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
18:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
19:     }
20:     else if (!content || content.trim().length === 0) {
21:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请输入评论内容' }
22:     }
23:     else if (!userid) {
24:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '请先登录' }
25:     }
26:     else {
27:         const data: Comment = {
28:             article_id: _id,
29:             userid,
30:             content: content.trim().slice(0, 1000),
31:             creat_date,
32:             is_delete: 0,
33:             timestamp,
34:         }
35:         try {
36:             const result = await CommentM.create(data).then(data => data.toObject())
37:             const filter = { _id }
38:             const body = {
39:                 $inc: {
40:                     comment_count: 1,
41:                 },
42:             }
43:             await ArticleM.updateOne(filter, body).exec()
44:             json = { code: 200, data: result, message: '发布成功' }
45:         }
46:         catch (err: unknown) {
47:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
48:         }
49:     }
50: 
51:     return json
52: }
53: 
54: /**
55:  * 前台浏览时, 读取评论列表
56:  */
57: export async function getList(reqQuery: ReqListQuery) {
58:     let json: ResData<Nullable<Lists<Comment[]>>>
59: 
60:     const {
61:         all,
62:         id: article_id,
63:     } = reqQuery
64: 
65:     let { limit, page } = reqQuery
66: 
67:     if (!article_id) {
68:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
69:     }
70:     else {
71:         page = Number(page) || 1
72:         limit = Number(limit) || 10
73: 
74:         const data: {
75:             article_id: string
76:             is_delete?: number
77:         } = {
78:             article_id,
79:         }
80:         const skip = (page - 1) * limit
81:         if (!all) {
82:             data.is_delete = 0
83:         }
84: 
85:         try {
86:             const [list, total] = await Promise.all([
87:                 CommentM.find(data).sort('-_id').skip(skip).limit(limit).exec().then(data => data.map(item => item.toObject())),
88:                 CommentM.countDocuments(data),
89:             ])
90:             const totalPage = Math.ceil(total / limit)
91:             json = {
92:                 code: 200,
93:                 data: {
94:                     list,
95:                     total,
96:                     hasNext: totalPage > page ? 1 : 0,
97:                     hasPrev: page > 1 ? 1 : 0,
98:                 },
99:             }
100:         }
101:         catch (err: unknown) {
102:             json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
103:         }
104:     }
105: 
106:     return json
107: }
108: 
109: export async function deletes(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
110:     let json: ResData<string | null>
111: 
112:     const {
113:         id: _id,
114:     } = reqQuery
115: 
116:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
117:         return { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
118:     }
119: 
120:     try {
121:         const comment = await CommentM.findById(_id).exec()
122:         if (!comment) {
123:             return { code: -200, data: null, message: '评论不存在' }
124:         }
125: 
126:         const filter = { _id }
127:         const commentBody = { is_delete: 1 }
128:         const articleFilter = { _id: comment.article_id }
129:         const ArticleBody = { $inc: { comment_count: -1 } }
130:         await Promise.all([
131:             CommentM.updateOne(filter, commentBody).exec(),
132:             ArticleM.updateOne(articleFilter, ArticleBody).exec(),
133:         ])
134:         json = { code: 200, message: '删除成功', data: 'success' }
135:     }
136:     catch (err: unknown) {
137:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
138:     }
139: 
140:     return json
141: }
142: 
143: export async function recover(reqQuery: { id: string }) {
144:     let json: ResData<string | null>
145: 
146:     const {
147:         id: _id,
148:     } = reqQuery
149: 
150:     if (!_id || !isValidObjectId(_id)) {
151:         return { code: -200, data: null, message: '参数错误' }
152:     }
153: 
154:     try {
155:         const comment = await CommentM.findById(_id).exec()
156:         if (!comment) {
157:             return { code: -200, data: null, message: '评论不存在' }
158:         }
159: 
160:         const filter = { _id }
161:         const commentBody = { is_delete: 0 }
162:         const articleFilter = { _id: comment.article_id }
163:         const ArticleBody = { $inc: { comment_count: 1 } }
164:         await Promise.all([
165:             CommentM.updateOne(filter, commentBody).exec(),
166:             ArticleM.updateOne(articleFilter, ArticleBody).exec(),
167:         ])
168:         json = { code: 200, message: '恢复成功', data: 'success' }
169:     }
170:     catch (err: unknown) {
171:         json = { code: -200, data: null, message: getErrorMessage(err) }
172:     }
173: 
174:     return json
175: }

(End of file - total 175 lines)
</content>
```

51: /**
52:  * 配置并返回一个静态文件服务器。

56:  */
57: function serve(path: string, cache: boolean) {
58:     // 根据是否启用缓存以及当前环境（是否是生产环境），设置文件的最大缓存时间。
59:     return express.static(resolve(path), {
60:         maxAge: (cache && isProd) ? 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 : 0,
61:     })
62: }
63: 
64: // view engine setup
65: app.set('views', resolve('./views'))// twig
66: app.set('twig options', {
67:     allow_async: true,
68:     strict_variables: false,
69: })
70: 
71: app.use(compression())
72: app.use(favicon(`${resolve('./public')}/favicon.ico`))
73: 
74: logger.token('remote-addr', (req) => {
75:     return requestIp.getClientIp(req) || 'unknown'
76: })
77: logger.token('date', () => {
78:     return UTC2Date(undefined, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:ii:ss.SSS')
79: })
80: 
81: app.use(
82:     logger('[:remote-addr] [:date] ":method :url" :status :res[content-length] ":referrer"', {
83:         skip(req) {
84:             const skipExt = ['.webmanifes', '.php', '.txt', '.map', '.js', '.css', '.png', 'jpg', '.jpeg', '.gif', '.ttf', '.woff2', '.ico']
85:             return skipExt.some((ext) => {
86:                 return req.url.includes(ext)
87:             })
88:         },
89:     }),
90: )
91: app.use(express.json({ limit: '5mb' }))
92: app.use(express.urlencoded({ limit: '5mb', extended: true }))
93: /**
94:  * 使用cookieParser中间件来解析cookie。
95:  * 该函数不接受参数，也没有返回值。
96:  * 它会将请求对象(req)上的cookie解析为一个对象，方便后续处理。
97:  */
98: app.use(cookieParser())
99: // app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'public')))
100: 
101: app.use('/static', serve('./public', true))
102: app.use('/api/app', apiLimiter, appRoutes)
103: app.use('/api/frontend', apiLimiter, frontendRoutes)
104: app.use('/api/backend', apiLimiter, backendRoutes)
105: app.use('/backend', routes)
106: app.use('/mockjs', mockjs)
107: 
108: app.get('*', (req, res) => {
109:     res.json({
110:         code: -200,
111:         message: '没有找到该页面',
112:     })
113: })
114: 
115: app.use((err: Error, _req: express.Request, res: express.Response, _next: express.NextFunction) => {
116:     console.error('[Error]', new Date().toISOString(), err.message)
117:     if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
118:         console.error(err.stack)
119:     }
120: 
121:     if (err.name === 'UnauthorizedError') {
122:         res.status(401).json({
123:             code: -401,
124:             message: '未授权，请登录',
125:             data: null,
126:         })
127:         return
128:     }
129: 
130:     if (err.name === 'ValidationError') {
131:         res.status(400).json({
132:             code: -400,
133:             message: err.message || '参数验证失败',
134:             data: null,
135:         })
136:         return
137:     }
138: 
139:     if (err.name === 'SyntaxError' && err.message.includes('JSON')) {

143:             data: null,
144:         })

147:

149:         code: -500,

151:         data: null,
152:     })
153: })
154: 
155: const port = process.env.PORT || 4000
156: app.set('port', port)
157: 
158: const server = http.createServer(app)
159: 
160: server.listen(port)
161: server.on('error', onError)
162: server.on('listening', onListening)
163: 
164: interface Errors extends Error {
165:     syscall: string
166:     code: string
167: }
168: 
169: /**
170:  * 处理监听错误的函数。
171:  * @param error 错误对象，预期为Errors类型，包含错误的详细信息。
172:  * 该函数不返回任何内容，但可能会因错误而使进程退出。
173:  */
174: function onError(error: Errors) {
175:     // 如果错误不是监听相关的，则直接抛出错误
176:     if (error.syscall !== 'listen') {
177:         throw error
178:     }
179: 
180:     // 根据端口类型（字符串或数字），生成相应的绑定信息
181:     const bind = typeof port === 'string' ? `Pipe ${port}` : `Port ${port}`
182: 
183:     // 根据错误代码，提供友好的错误消息并处理
184:     switch (error.code) {
185:         case 'EACCES':
186:             // 如果是权限错误，输出错误信息并退出进程
187:             console.error(`${bind} requires elevated privileges`)
188:             process.exit(1)
189:             break
190:         case 'EADDRINUSE':
191:             // 如果端口已被占用，输出错误信息并退出进程
192:             console.error(`${bind} is already in use`)
193:             process.exit(1)
194:             break
195:         default:
196:             // 对于其他错误，抛出错误
197:             throw error
198:     }
199: }
200: 
201: /**
202:  * 当服务器开始监听时调用的函数。
203:  * 该函数没有参数和返回值。
204:  * 主要用于输出服务器监听的地址和端口信息。
205:  */
206: function onListening() {
207:     // 获取服务器监听的地址信息
208:     const addr = server.address()!
209:     const bind = typeof addr === 'string' ? `${addr}` : `${addr.port}`
210:     // 打印监听的地址和端口信息
211:     console.log(`Listening on: http://localhost:${bind}`)
212: }

27:     // Validate the response object
28:     if (!response) {
29:         return {
30:             code: -404,
31:             message: '未知错误: 响应对象不存在',
32:             data: '',
33:         }
34:     }
35: 
36:     // Validate the response status
37:     if (response.status === 200 || response.status === 304) {
38:         // Validate the response data
39:         if (response.data) {
40:             return response.data
41:         }
42:         else {
43:             return {
44:                 code: -404,
45:                 message: '未知错误: 响应数据不存在',
46:                 data: '',
47:             }
48:         }
49:     }
50: 
51:     // Return an error object with the status text or a default message
52:     return {
53:         code: -404,
54:         message: response.statusText || '未知错误',
55:         data: '',
56:     }
57: }
58: 
59: /**
60:  * 检查响应码并根据不同的响应码执行相应的操作。
61:  * @param res - 包含响应数据和状态码的对象。
62:  * @returns 返回原始的响应对象。
63:  */
64: function checkCode(res: ResponseData<any>): ResponseData<any> {
65:     // 根据不同的响应码重定向到不同的页面或显示消息
66:     if (res.code === -500) {
67:         window.location.href = '/backend'
68:     }
69:     else if (res.code === -400) {
70:         window.location.href = '/'
71:     }
72:     else if (res.code !== 200) {
73:         showMsg(res.message)
74:     }
75:     return res
76: }
77: 
78: /**
79:  * axios Api 封装
80:  * @returns ApiClient
81:  * @example
82:  * ```
83:  * get(url: '/api/url', params: {}, headers: {})
84:  * post(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
85:  * file(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
86:  * ```
87:  */
88: function api(): ApiClient {
89:     return {
90:         async file(url, data) {
91:             const response = await axios({
92:                 method: 'post',
93:                 url,
94:                 data,
95:                 headers: {
96:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
97:                 },
98:             })
99:             const res = checkStatus(response)
100:             return checkCode(res)
101:         },
102:         async post(url, data) {
103:             const response = await axios({
104:                 method: 'post',
105:                 url: config.api + url,
106:                 data: qs.stringify(data),
107:                 timeout: config.timeout,
108:                 headers: {
109:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
110:                     'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
111:                 },
112:             })
113:             const res = checkStatus(response)
114:             return checkCode(res)
115:         },
116:         async get(url, params) {
117:             const response = await axios({
118:                 method: 'get',
119:                 url: config.api + url,
120:                 params,
121:                 timeout: config.timeout,
122:                 headers: {
123:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
124:                 },
125:             })
126:             const res = checkStatus(response)
127:             return checkCode(res)
128:         },
129:     }
130: }
131: 
132: export default api()

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-03-07 22:41:34*

*[step-start part]*

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

我发现了一个严重的bug！在 `index-client.ts` 中：

1. `post` 方法使用 `config.api + url` (第105行)
2. `get` 方法使用 `config.api + url` (第119行)
3. `file` 方法直接使用 `url` (第93行) - **没有加 `config.api` 前缀！**

这意味着调用 `api.file('/upload', data)` 会发送请求到 `/upload` 而不是 `/api/upload`，导致 404 错误。

让我修复这个 bug。

</details>

发现一个**严重 Bug**！

在 `index-client.ts` 中，`file` 方法没有添加 `config.api` 前缀，而 `get` 和 `post` 方法都有。这会导致文件上传请求路径错误。

212: }

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken'
2: import { secretClient, secretServer } from '../config'
3: 
4: /**
5:  * 检查JWT（JSON Web Token）的有效性。
6:  * @param token 需要验证的JWT字符串。
7:  * @param userid 需要验证的用户ID。
8:  * @param username 需要验证的用户名，将进行解码和比对。
9:  * @param type 标记JWT的类型，决定使用哪个密钥进行验证，'user' 表示用户类型。
10:  * @returns 返回一个Promise，解析为一个布尔值，true表示验证成功，false表示验证失败。
11:  */
12: export function checkJWT(token: string, userid: string, username: string, type: string): Promise<boolean> {
13:     return new Promise((resolve) => {
14:         // 根据JWT类型选择使用的密钥
15:         const secret = type === 'user' ? secretClient : secretServer
16:         jwt.verify(token, secret, (err, decoded) => {
17:             // 验证出现错误，或者解码结果为空或为字符串，认为验证失败
18:             if (err || !decoded || typeof decoded === 'string') {
19:                 resolve(false)
20:             }
21:             // 检查解码后的id和username是否匹配
22:             else if (decoded.id === userid && (decoded.username === username || decoded.username === encodeURI(username))) {
23:                 resolve(true)
24:             }
25:             // 不匹配，验证失败
26:             else {
27:                 resolve(false)
28:             }
29:         })
30:     })
31: }

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import axios from 'axios'
2: import qs from 'qs'
3: 
4: import type { AxiosResponse } from 'axios'
5: import config from './config-client'
6: 
7: axios.interceptors.request.use(
8:     (config) => {
9:         return config
10:     },
11:     (error) => {
12:         return Promise.reject(error)
13:     },
14: )
15: 
16: axios.interceptors.response.use(
17:     response => response,
18:     error => Promise.resolve(error.response),
19: )
20: 
21: /**
22:  * 检查HTTP响应的状态，并返回处理后的响应数据。
23:  * @param response - AxiosResponse对象，包含从服务器接收的完整响应信息。
24:  * @returns 返回一个ResponseData对象，要么是原始响应数据，要么是包含错误代码、错误消息和空数据的对象。
25:  */
26: function checkStatus(response: AxiosResponse): ResponseData<any> {
27:     // Validate the response object
28:     if (!response) {
29:         return {
30:             code: -404,
31:             message: '未知错误: 响应对象不存在',
32:             data: '',
33:         }
34:     }
35: 
36:     // Validate the response status
37:     if (response.status === 200 || response.status === 304) {
38:         // Validate the response data
39:         if (response.data) {
40:             return response.data
41:         }
42:         else {
43:             return {
44:                 code: -404,
45:                 message: '未知错误: 响应数据不存在',
46:                 data: '',
47:             }
48:         }
49:     }
50: 
51:     // Return an error object with the status text or a default message
52:     return {
53:         code: -404,
54:         message: response.statusText || '未知错误',
55:         data: '',
56:     }
57: }
58: 
59: /**
60:  * 检查响应码并根据不同的响应码执行相应的操作。
61:  * @param res - 包含响应数据和状态码的对象。
62:  * @returns 返回原始的响应对象。
63:  */
64: function checkCode(res: ResponseData<any>): ResponseData<any> {
65:     // 根据不同的响应码重定向到不同的页面或显示消息
66:     if (res.code === -500) {
67:         window.location.href = '/backend'
68:     }
69:     else if (res.code === -400) {
70:         window.location.href = '/'
71:     }
72:     else if (res.code !== 200) {
73:         showMsg(res.message)
74:     }
75:     return res
76: }
77: 
78: /**
79:  * axios Api 封装
80:  * @returns ApiClient
81:  * @example
82:  * ```
83:  * get(url: '/api/url', params: {}, headers: {})
84:  * post(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
85:  * file(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
86:  * ```
87:  */
88: function api(): ApiClient {
89:     return {
90: async file(url, data) {
91:             const response = await axios({
92:                 method: 'post',
93:                 url: config.api + url,
94:                 data,
95:                 timeout: config.timeout,
96:                 headers: {
97:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
98:                 },
99:             })
100:             const res = checkStatus(response)
101:             return checkCode(res)
102:         },
103:         async post(url, data) {
104:             const response = await axios({
105:                 method: 'post',
106:                 url: config.api + url,
107:                 data: qs.stringify(data),
108:                 timeout: config.timeout,
109:                 headers: {
110:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
111:                     'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
112:                 },
113:             })
114:             const res = checkStatus(response)
115:             return checkCode(res)
116:         },
117:         async get(url, params) {
118:             const response = await axios({
119:                 method: 'get',
120:                 url: config.api + url,
121:                 params,
122:                 timeout: config.timeout,
123:                 headers: {
124:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
125:                 },
126:             })
127:             const res = checkStatus(response)
128:             return checkCode(res)
129:         },
130:     }
131: }
132: 
133: export default api()

(End of file - total 133 lines)
</content>
```

128:             { name: 'user_modify', path: 'user/modify/:id', component: BackendUserModify, ...backendConfig },
129:         ],
130:     },
131: 
132:     { name: '404', path: '/:catchAll(.*)', component: NotFound },
133: ]
134: 
135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

(End of file - total 193 lines)
</content>
```

155: const port = process.env.PORT || 4000
156: app.set('port', port)
157: 
158: const server = http.createServer(app)
159: 
160: server.listen(port)
161: server.on('error', onError)
162: server.on('listening', onListening)
163: 
164: interface Errors extends Error {
165:     syscall: string
166:     code: string
167: }
168: 
169: /**
170:  * 处理监听错误的函数。
171:  * @param error 错误对象，预期为Errors类型，包含错误的详细信息。
172:  * 该函数不返回任何内容，但可能会因错误而使进程退出。
173:  */
174: function onError(error: Errors) {
175:     // 如果错误不是监听相关的，则直接抛出错误
176:     if (error.syscall !== 'listen') {
177:         throw error
178:     }
179: 
180:     // 根据端口类型（字符串或数字），生成相应的绑定信息

185:         case 'EACCES':

193:             process.exit(1)

198:     }

200:

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken'
2: import { secretClient, secretServer } from '../config'
3: 
4: /**
5:  * 检查JWT（JSON Web Token）的有效性。
6:  * @param token 需要验证的JWT字符串。
7:  * @param userid 需要验证的用户ID。
8:  * @param username 需要验证的用户名，将进行解码和比对。
9:  * @param type 标记JWT的类型，决定使用哪个密钥进行验证，'user' 表示用户类型。
10:  * @returns 返回一个Promise，解析为一个布尔值，true表示验证成功，false表示验证失败。
11:  */
12: export function checkJWT(token: string, userid: string, username: string, type: string): Promise<boolean> {
13:     return new Promise((resolve) => {
14:         // 根据JWT类型选择使用的密钥
15:         const secret = type === 'user' ? secretClient : secretServer
16:         jwt.verify(token, secret, (err, decoded) => {
17:             // 验证出现错误，或者解码结果为空或为字符串，认为验证失败
18:             if (err || !decoded || typeof decoded === 'string') {
19:                 resolve(false)
20:             }
21:             // 检查解码后的id和username是否匹配
22:             else if (decoded.id === userid && (decoded.username === username || decoded.username === encodeURI(username))) {
23:                 resolve(true)
24:             }
25:             // 不匹配，验证失败
26:             else {
27:                 resolve(false)
28:             }
29:         })
30:     })
31: }

(End of file - total 31 lines)
</content>
```

19: )
20: 
21: /**
22:  * 检查HTTP响应的状态，并返回处理后的响应数据。
23:  * @param response - AxiosResponse对象，包含从服务器接收的完整响应信息。
24:  * @returns 返回一个ResponseData对象，要么是原始响应数据，要么是包含错误代码、错误消息和空数据的对象。
25:  */
26: function checkStatus(response: AxiosResponse): ResponseData<any> {
27:     // Validate the response object
28:     if (!response) {
29:         return {
30:             code: -404,
31:             message: '未知错误: 响应对象不存在',
32:             data: '',
33:         }
34:     }
35: 
36:     // Validate the response status
37:     if (response.status === 200 || response.status === 304) {
38:         // Validate the response data
39:         if (response.data) {
40:             return response.data
41:         }
42:         else {
43:             return {
44:                 code: -404,
45:                 message: '未知错误: 响应数据不存在',
46:                 data: '',
47:             }
48:         }
49:     }
50: 
51:     // Return an error object with the status text or a default message
52:     return {
53:         code: -404,
54:         message: response.statusText || '未知错误',
55:         data: '',
56:     }
57: }
58: 
59: /**
60:  * 检查响应码并根据不同的响应码执行相应的操作。
61:  * @param res - 包含响应数据和状态码的对象。
62:  * @returns 返回原始的响应对象。
63:  */
64: function checkCode(res: ResponseData<any>): ResponseData<any> {
65:     // 根据不同的响应码重定向到不同的页面或显示消息
66:     if (res.code === -500) {
67:         window.location.href = '/backend'
68:     }
69:     else if (res.code === -400) {
70:         window.location.href = '/'
71:     }
72:     else if (res.code !== 200) {
73:         showMsg(res.message)
74:     }
75:     return res
76: }
77: 
78: /**
79:  * axios Api 封装
80:  * @returns ApiClient
81:  * @example
82:  * ```
83:  * get(url: '/api/url', params: {}, headers: {})
84:  * post(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
85:  * file(url: '/api/url', data: {}, headers: {})
86:  * ```
87:  */
88: function api(): ApiClient {
89:     return {
90: async file(url, data) {
91:             const response = await axios({
92:                 method: 'post',
93:                 url: config.api + url,
94:                 data,
95:                 timeout: config.timeout,
96:                 headers: {
97:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
98:                 },
99:             })
100:             const res = checkStatus(response)
101:             return checkCode(res)
102:         },
103:         async post(url, data) {
104:             const response = await axios({
105:                 method: 'post',
106:                 url: config.api + url,
107:                 data: qs.stringify(data),
108:                 timeout: config.timeout,
109:                 headers: {
110:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
111:                     'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
112:                 },
113:             })
114:             const res = checkStatus(response)
115:             return checkCode(res)
116:         },
117:         async get(url, params) {
118:             const response = await axios({
119:                 method: 'get',
120:                 url: config.api + url,
121:                 params,
122:                 timeout: config.timeout,
123:                 headers: {
124:                     'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
125:                 },
126:             })
127:             const res = checkStatus(response)
128:             return checkCode(res)
129:         },
130:     }
131: }
132: 
133: export default api()

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

(End of file - total 193 lines)

*2026-03-07 22:41:34*

*[step-start part]*

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

用户遇到了 bcrypt 模块找不到的问题。这是因为 bcrypt 是一个原生模块，需要编译本地绑定。在 monorepo 结构中使用 pnpm workspace 时，bcrypt 的原生绑定可能没有正确编译。

错误信息显示：
```
Error: Cannot find module 'C:\Users\zm\Desktop\project\vue3-vite-express\node_modules\.pnpm\bcrypt@5.1.1\node_modules\bcrypt\lib\binding\napi-v3\bcrypt_lib.node'
```

这意味着 bcrypt 的原生绑定文件不存在。需要重新安装并编译 bcrypt。

解决方案：
1. 在项目根目录重新安装依赖
2. 或者使用 bcryptjs 替代 bcrypt（纯 JavaScript 实现，不需要编译）

bcryptjs 是一个更好的选择，因为它不需要编译原生模块，在所有平台上都能工作。

让我帮用户修复这个问题。

</details>

bcrypt 原生模块编译问题。最简单的解决方案是使用 `bcryptjs`（纯 JavaScript 实现）：

  "description": "Replace bcrypt with bcryptjs",

}
```

9: }

11: export async function verifyPassword(password: string, hashedPassword: string): Promise<boolean> {
12:     if (hashedPassword.startsWith('$2')) {
13:         return bcrypt.compare(password, hashedPassword)

15:     const md5Hash = md5(md5Pre + password)
16:     return md5Hash === hashedPassword

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。
138:         history: import.meta.env.SSR ? createMemoryHistory() : createWebHistory(),
139:         routes,
140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

我看到了路由配置。根路径 `/` 应该显示 `FrontendIndex` 组件。但是用户说访问 localhost:5173 会自动跳转到 /backend。

让我检查一下是否有其他地方会导致这个跳转：

1. `FrontendIndex` 组件内部可能有重定向
2. 可能有全局导航守卫
3. 可能有其他代码导致跳转

从路由配置来看，`/` 路径没有 `beforeEnter` 守卫，也没有 `redirect`。

但是注意到 `backendConfig` 中有 `beforeEnter: guardRouteBackend`，这会检查 `b_user` cookie，如果没有就跳转到 `/backend/login`。

但这不应该影响根路径 `/`。

让我检查 `FrontendIndex` 组件是否有重定向逻辑。

</details>

我看到路由配置中 `/` 路径没有重定向。让我检查 `FrontendIndex` 组件是否有重定向逻辑：

64: <script setup lang="ts">
65: import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
66: import { useRouter, useRoute } from 'vue-router'
67: import {
68:     Navbar,
69:     ThemeToggle,
70:     GlassPanel,
71:     EntityCard,
72:     BaseButton,
73:     BackToTop,
74:     ArticleCard,
75:     Sidebar,
76:     SearchBox,
77: } from '@/components'
78: import type { Article, Category, HotArticle } from '@/components'
79: 
80: defineOptions({
81:     name: 'FrontendIndex',
82:     asyncData(ctx) {
83:         const { store, route, api } = ctx
84:         const {
85:             params: { id, key, by },
86:             fullPath: path,
87:         } = route
88:         const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore(store)
89:         const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore(store)
90:         return Promise.all([
91:             globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList({}, api),
92:             frontendArticleStore.getTrending(undefined, api),
93:             frontendArticleStore.getArticleList({ page: 1, limit: 10, id, path, key, by }, api),
94:         ])
95:     },
96: })
97: 
98: const route = useRoute()
99: const router = useRouter()
100: 
101: const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore()
102: const { lists: category } = $(storeToRefs(globalCategoryStore))
103: 
104: const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore()
105: const { lists: topics, trending } = $(storeToRefs(frontendArticleStore))
106: 
107: useSaveScroll()
108: 
109: const {
110:     params: { id, key, by },
111:     path,
112: } = route
113: 
114: const [loading, toggleLoading] = useToggle(false)
115: const searchKey = ref(key || '')
116: 
117: async function loadMore(page = topics.page) {
118:     if (loading.value) {
119:         return
120:     }
121:     toggleLoading(true)
122:     await frontendArticleStore.getArticleList({ page, limit: 10, id, path, key, by })
123:     toggleLoading(false)
124: }
125: 
126: onActivated(() => {
127:     console.log(`frontend-index onActivated:${route.path}`)
128:     if (topics.path !== route.path) {
129:         loadMore(1)
130:     }
131: })
132: 
133: const handleSearch = (query: string) => {
134:     if (query.trim()) {
135:         router.push(`/search/${query}`)
136:     }
137: }
138: 
139: const transformArticle = (item: any): Article => {
140:     return {
141:         id: item._id,
142:         title: item.title,
143:         excerpt: item.content || '',
144:         thumbnail: item.img_url,
145:         category: item.category?.cate_name,
146:         date: item.create_at?.slice(0, 10) || '',
147:         views: item.visit || 0,
148:         comments: item.comment_count || 0,
149:         tags: item.tags,
150:     }
151: }
152: 
153: const transformCategories = (cats: any[]): Category[] => {
154:     return cats.map(cat => ({
155:         name: cat.cate_name,
156:         count: cat.count || 0,
157:     }))
158: }
159: 
160: const transformTrending = (trendingList: any[]): HotArticle[] => {
161:     return trendingList.map(item => ({
162:         id: item._id,
163:         title: item.title,
164:         views: item.visit || 0,
165:     }))
166: }
167: 
168: const headTitle = computed(() => {
169:     let title = '湛明'
170:     const { id, key, by } = route.params
171:     if (id) {
172:         const obj = category.find(item => item._id === id)
173:         if (obj) {
174:             title = `${obj.cate_name} - ${title}`
175:         }
176:     }
177:     else if (key) {
178:         title = `搜索: ${key} - ${title}`
179:     }
180:     else if (by) {
181:         title = `热门 - ${title}`
182:     }
183:     return title
184: })
185: 
186: useHead({
187:     title: headTitle,

我检查了代码，从路由配置来看，`/` 路径应该显示 `FrontendIndex` 组件，没有任何重定向逻辑会导致跳转到 `/backend`。

**可能的原因：**

1. **浏览器缓存** - 之前访问过 `/backend`，浏览器自动跳转
2. **Service Worker 缓存** - PWA 缓存了旧的路由

**请尝试：**

1. 清除浏览器缓存后刷新
2. 使用无痕模式打开
3. 或者在浏览器开发者工具中禁用缓存

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-03-07 22:41:34*

*[step-start part]*

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

现在我理解了问题！

`checkCode` 函数会检查响应码：
- `-500` → 跳转到 `/backend`
- `-400` → 跳转到 `/`

这意味着当后端返回 `-500` 错误码时，前端会自动跳转到 `/backend`。

问题可能是：
1. 后端 API 在启动时返回了 `-500` 错误码
2. 首页加载时调用了某个 API，该 API 返回了 `-500`

让我检查首页加载时会调用哪些 API，以及后端是否可能返回 `-500`。

从 `frontend-index.vue` 中，我看到 `asyncData` 会调用：
1. `globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList()`
2. `frontendArticleStore.getTrending()`
3. `frontendArticleStore.getArticleList()`

这些 API 如果返回 `-500`，就会导致跳转到 `/backend`。

让我检查后端是否正在运行，以及这些 API 的响应。问题可能是后端没有正确启动或者数据库连接失败。

</details>

找到原因了！

**问题分析：**

`checkCode` 函数在 `index-client.ts:66-68` 中：
```typescript
if (res.code === -500) {
    window.location.href = '/backend'
}
```

当后端 API 返回 `-500` 错误码时，前端会自动跳转到 `/backend`。

**可能原因：**
1. 后端服务未启动或启动失败
2. 数据库连接失败
3. API 请求失败返回 `-500`

让我检查后端服务状态：

**Status:** completed

  "timeout": 10000
}
```

```

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。

143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'

147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path

177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }

182:             activated.map((c) => {

185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

Checking the router.ts file, I can see:

1. Line 74: `{ name: 'index', path: '/', component: FrontendIndex, meta: { index: 1 } }` - The root path `/` shows `FrontendIndex` component without any redirect.

2. Lines 111-130: The `/backend` route has a redirect to `/backend/article/list`:
```javascript
{
    name: 'backend',
    path: '/backend',
    component: BackendIndex,
    redirect: '/backend/article/list',
    ...
}
```

So there's no redirect from `/` to `/backend` in the router configuration.

The only place that could cause a redirect to `/backend` is in `index-client.ts` where `checkCode` checks for `-500` error code:
```javascript
if (res.code === -500) {
    window.location.href = '/backend'
}
```

But when I tested the APIs, they all return `200`. So why is this happening?

Let me check if there's any issue with the `checkCode` function or if the API calls in `FrontendIndex` component are failing.

Actually, I should check if the `FrontendIndex` component's `asyncData` function might be failing. Let me look at that component more carefully.

</details>

让我检查 `FrontendIndex` 组件的 `asyncData` 函数，看看是否有问题：</think>找到原因了！

**问题在 `index-client.ts:66-68`**：

```typescript
if (res.code === -500) {
    window.location.href = '/backend'
}
```

当 API 返回 `-500` 错误码时，前端会自动跳转到 `/backend`。

```javascript
asyncData(ctx) {
    const { store, route, api } = ctx
    const {
        params: { id, key, by },
        fullPath: path,
    } = route
    const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore(store)
    const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore(store)
    return Promise.all([
        globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList({}, api),
        frontendArticleStore.getTrending(undefined, api),
        frontendArticleStore.getArticleList({ page: 1, limit: 10, id, path, key, by }, api),
    ])
},
```

This function makes three API calls:
1. `getCategoryList`
2. `getTrending`
3. `getArticleList`

If any of these API calls return `-500`, the `checkCode` function in `index-client.ts` will redirect to `/backend`.

I tested the backend APIs and they all return `200`. So the issue might be:
1. The API calls are failing for some reason (maybe database connection issue)
2. There's something wrong with how the API client is making requests

Let me check the index-client.ts file to see the checkCode function and understand when it would trigger the redirect.

Now I see the full `index-client.ts` file. The `checkCode` function at line 64-76 shows:

```javascript
function checkCode(res: ResponseData<any>): ResponseData<any> {
    // 根据不同的响应码重定向到不同的页面或显示消息
    if (res.code === -500) {
        window.location.href = '/backend'
    }
    else if (res.code === -400) {
        window.location.href = '/'
    }
    else if (res.code !== 200) {
        showMsg(res.message)
    }
    return res
}
```

This shows that when any API returns `-500`, it redirects to `/backend`. This is intended for backend admin authentication errors.

But the problem is: why is the frontend index page causing a redirect to `/backend`?

Let me think about this:
1. When user visits `/`, the `FrontendIndex` component loads
2. `asyncData` is called which makes API requests
3. If any API returns `-500`, the page redirects to `/backend`

The issue might be that the backend is not running properly, or there's a database connection issue. Let me check if the backend is actually running and responding correctly.

Actually, I tested the backend APIs earlier and they returned `200`:
- `/api/frontend/category/list` returned `{"code":200,...}`
- `/api/frontend/article/trending` returned `{"code":200,...}`

So the backend is working. The issue might be something else.

Wait, let me look at the `checkStatus` function again:

```javascript
function checkStatus(response: AxiosResponse): ResponseData<any> {
    // Validate the response object
    if (!response) {
        return {
            code: -404,
            message: '未知错误: 响应对象不存在',
            data: '',
        }
    }

    // Validate the response status
    if (response.status === 200 || response.status === 304) {
        // Validate the response data
        if (response.data) {
            return response.data
        }
        else {
            return {
                code: -404,
                message: '未知错误: 响应数据不存在',
                data: '',
            }
        }
    }

    // Return an error object with the status text or a default message
    return {
        code: -404,
        message: response.statusText || '未知错误',
        data: '',
    }
}
```

This function returns `-404` for network errors, not `-500`. So the `-500` must be coming from the backend itself.

I need to trace where the `-500` error is actually being generated. The backend APIs I tested returned `200`, so something in the request flow must be different when the frontend makes the call versus my direct tests.

When I tested `curl -s http://localhost:4000/api/frontend/category/list`, it worked fine. But I should verify the port configuration is correct. Let me check `config-client.ts` to see what API URL the frontend is actually using.

</details>

Now I can see the full picture:

1. **Frontend API config** (`config-client.ts`): `api: '/api/'`
2. **Vite proxy** (`vite.config.ts` lines 94-106):
   - `/api` → `http://localhost:4000`
   - `/mockjs` → `http://localhost:4000`
   - `/backend` → `http://localhost:4000`

So when the frontend makes a request to `/api/frontend/xxx`, Vite proxies it to `http://localhost:4000/api/frontend/xxx`.

The backend is running on port 4000, and I tested it with curl and it returned `200`. But the frontend is redirecting to `/backend` because some API is returning `-500`.

Wait, let me think about this more carefully. The user said that when they click `http://localhost:5173/`, it automatically redirects to `http://localhost:5173/backend`.

But looking at the `checkCode` function:
```javascript
if (res.code === -500) {
    window.location.href = '/backend'
}
```

This sets `window.location.href = '/backend'`, which would navigate to `/backend`, not `http://localhost:5173/backend`. Since the frontend is running on port 5173, this would indeed navigate to `http://localhost:5173/backend`.

So the question is: why is an API returning `-500`?

Actually, looking at the backend error earlier:
```
[后端] Port 4000 is already in use
[后端] [nodemon] app crashed - waiting for file changes before starting...
```

The backend crashed because port 4000 was already in use. Then the user killed the process, but maybe the backend didn't restart properly?

Or maybe the issue is that when the frontend loads, it makes API calls, but the backend isn't ready yet, so the API returns an error.

Actually, looking at the user's output more carefully:```

22:35:01","is_delete":0,"timestamp":1747751701,"likes":[],"id":"682c931509594402de5d78e7","like_status":false},{"_id":"67fa5c1009594402de5d77e0","title":"李雅普诺夫能量函数理解","content":"### **李雅普诺夫能量函数的理解**\n李雅普诺夫能量函数（Lyapunov Function）是分析动态系统稳定性的核心工具，其核心思想是**构造一个类似于“能量”的标量函数 \\( V(x) \\)**，通过研究 \\( V(x) \\) 随时间的变化趋势，判断系统的稳定性。下面从**物理意义、数学构造、稳定性判据**三个方面详细解释。\n\n---\n\n## **1. 物理意义：能量类比**\n在物理系统中，稳定的系统能量总是不断被耗散的，热力学第二定律的约束，统计物理视角：微观不可逆性，能量通常具有以下性质：\n• **非负性**（\\( V(x) \\geq 0 \\)），且仅在平衡点 \\( x = 0 \\) 时为零。\n• **耗散性**（如摩擦导致机械能减少），即 \\( \\dot{V}(x) \\leq 0 \\)。\n\n李雅普诺夫函数 \\( V(x) \\) 模拟了这一行为：\n• **\\( V(x) \\) 代表系统的“广义能量”**，可以是机械能、电能，或抽象的正定函数。\n• **\\( \\dot{V}(x) \\) 表示能量的变化率**：\n  • 若 \\( \\dot{V}(x) < 0 \\)，能量持续减...","category":"67fa5bb809594402de5d77de","category_name":"控制理论","visit":5,"like":1,"comment_count":0,"creat_date":"2025-04-12 20:26:56","update_date":"2025-04-12 从 `frontend-index.vue` 中可以看到：
```typescript
asyncData(ctx) {
    const { store, route, api } = ctx
    const {
        params: { id, key, by },
        fullPath: path,
    } = route
    const globalCategoryStore = useGlobalCategoryStore(store)
    const frontendArticleStore = useFrontendArticleStore(store)
    return Promise.all([
        globalCategoryStore.getCategoryList({}, api),
        frontendArticleStore.getTrending(undefined, api),
        frontendArticleStore.getArticleList({ page: 1, limit: 10, id, path, key, by }, api),
    ])
},
```

它调用了三个 API：
1. `getCategoryList`
2. `getTrending`
3. `getArticleList`

让我测试 `getTrending` API：

135: export function createRouter(store: Pinia) {
136:     const router = _createRouter({
137:         // 为服务器/客户端使用适当的历史实现 import.meta.env.SSR 由 Vite 注入。

140:     })
141: 
142:     const slideLeft = 'slide-left'
143:     const slideRight = 'slide-right'
144: 
145:     router.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {
146:         const appShellStore = useAppShellStore(store)
147:         const { needPageTransition } = storeToRefs(appShellStore)
148:         // 如果不需要切换动画，直接返回
149:         if (needPageTransition.value) {
150:             // 根据 alwaysBackPage, alwaysForwardPage 来判断切换动画
151:             // 判断当前是前进还是后退，添加不同的动画效果
152:             // const pageTransitionName = isForward(to, from) ? slideLeft : slideRight
153:             // =================== //
154:             // 根据路由中的 meta.index 来判断切换动画
155:             let pageTransitionName: string
156:             if (!from.meta.index || to.meta.index === from.meta.index) {
157:                 pageTransitionName = 'fade'
158:             }
159:             else if ((to.meta.index as number) > (from.meta.index as number)) {
160:                 pageTransitionName = slideLeft
161:             }
162:             else {
163:                 pageTransitionName = slideRight
164:             }
165: 
166:             appShellStore.setPageTransitionName(pageTransitionName)
167:         }
168:         next()
169:     })
170: 
171:     router.beforeResolve(async (to, from) => {
172:         let diffed = false
173:         const activated = to.matched.filter((c, i) => {
174:             return diffed || (diffed = from.matched[i] !== c) || from.path !== to.path
175:         })
176: 
177:         if (!activated.length) {
178:             return false
179:         }
180: 
181:         await Promise.all(
182:             activated.map((c) => {
183:                 if ((c.components?.default as any).asyncData) {
184:                     return (c.components?.default as any).asyncData({ store, route: to })
185:                 }
186: 
187:                 return true
188:             }),
189:         )
190:     })
191: 
192:     return router
193: }

### 🤖 Assistant
*2026-03-07 22:41:34*

*[step-start part]*

💭 **Reasoning:**

<details>
<summary>Click to expand reasoning</summary>

现在我找到了问题的根源！

在 `use-global-category-store.ts` 第 23 行：
```typescript
const { code, data } = await $api.get<ResDataList<Category>>('backend/category/list', { ...config, path: undefined, cache: true })
```

`getCategoryList` 调用的是 `backend/category/list` API，而不是 `frontend/category/list`！

但是，`/api/backend/category/list` 需要 `isAdmin` 认证！

看 `routes/backend.ts`：
```typescript
router.get('/category/list', isAdmin, backendCategory.getList)
```

所以，当未登录的用户访问首页时：
1. `getCategoryList` 调用 `/api/backend/category/list`
2. `isAdmin` 中间件检查 `b_user` cookie
3. 没有 `b_user` cookie，返回 `code: -500`
4. `checkCode` 函数检测到 `-500`，跳转到 `/backend`

这就是问题的根本原因！

**解决方案：**

1. 在 `routes/frontend.ts` 添加公开的分类列表 API
2. 或者修改 `getCategoryList` 使用公开的 API

让我添加一个公开的分类列表 API。

</details>

**找到根本原因了！**

在 `use-global-category-store.ts:23`：
```typescript
$api.get<ResDataList<Category>>('backend/category/list', ...)
```

`getCategoryList` 调用的是 `/api/backend/category/list`，但这个 API 需要 `isAdmin` 认证！

**问题链：**
1. 首页加载调用 `getCategoryList`
2. 请求 `/api/backend/category/list`
3. `isAdmin` 中间件检查 `b_user` cookie
4. 无 `b_user` → 返回 `code: -500`
5. `checkCode` 检测到 `-500` → 跳转 `/backend`

**解决方案：在 `routes/frontend.ts` 添加公开的分类 API**

|\n|---------|---------|---------|\n| `blog-vite-vue3/src/pinia/use-global-category-store.ts:23` | 前台store调用 `backend/category/list`，需要管理员认证 | **严重** |\n| `blog-vite-vue3/src/pinia/use-global-category-store.ts:33` | 前台store调用 `backend/category/item`，需要管理员认证 | **严重** |\n\n**问题分析**：\n\n```\n用户访问首页 (/)\n    ↓\nFrontendIndex 组件加载\n    ↓\n调用 getCategoryList()\n    ↓\n请求 /api/backend/category/list\n    ↓\nisAdmin 中间件检查 b_user cookie\n    ↓\n无 b_user → 返回 code: -500\n    ↓\ncheckCode 检测 -500 → window.location.href = '/backend'\n    ↓\n自动跳转到 /backend ❌\n```\n\n**修复方案**：\n1. 修改前端 store 使用 `frontend/category/list`\n2. 后端添加公开的分类 API\n\n**修复状态**：✅ 已修复\n\n---\n\n### 7.2 前端 API 客户端路径问题 🔴\n\n| 文件位置 | 问题描述 | 严重程度 |\n|---------|---------|---------|\n| `blog-vite-vue3/src/api/index-client.ts:57-64` | `file` 方法缺少 `config.api` 前缀 | **高** |\n\n**问题代码**：\n```typescript\n// 错误\nasync file(url, data) {\n    const response = await axios({\n        method: 'post',\n        url,  // ❌ 缺少 config.api 前缀\n        data,\n    })\n}\n\n// 正确\nasync file(url, data) {\n    const response = await axios({\n        method: 'post',\n        url: config.api + url,  // ✅ 添加前缀\n        data,\n    })\n}\n```\n\n**修复状态**：✅ 已修复\n\n---\n\n### 7.3 bcrypt 原生模块编译问题 🟡\n\n| 文件位置 | 问题描述 | 严重程度 |\n|---------|---------|---------|\n| `blog-api-ts/package.json` | `bcrypt` 需要 Node 原生编译，Windows 环境可能失败 | **中** |\n\n**解决方案**：替换为 `bcryptjs`（纯 JavaScript 实现）\n\n```bash\npnpm remove bcrypt\npnpm add bcryptjs\npnpm add -D @types/bcryptjs\n```\n\n**修复状态**：✅ 已修复\n\n---\n\n### 7.4 前后端路由对照表\n\n| 功能 | 前端调用 | 后端路由 | 认证 |\n|------|----------|----------|------|\n| 分类列表(前台) | `frontend/category/list` | `GET /api/frontend/category/list` | 无 |\n| 分类列表(后台) | `backend/category/list` | `GET /api/backend/category/list` | isAdmin |\n| 文章列表(前台) | `frontend/article/list` | `GET /api/frontend/article/list` | 无 |\n| 文章列表(后台) | `backend/article/list` | `GET /api/backend/article/list` | isAdmin |\n| 用户登录 | `frontend/user/login` | `POST /api/frontend/user/login` | 无 |\n| 管理员登录 | `backend/user/login` | `POST /api/backend/user/login` | 无 |\n| 点赞 | `frontend/like` | `POST /api/frontend/like` | isUser |\n| 评论 | `frontend/comment/insert` | `POST /api/frontend/comment/insert` | isUser |\n| AI聊天 | `app/chat/completions` | `POST /api/app/chat/completions` | isUser |\n\n---\n\n### 7.5 Cookie 认证流程\n\n**用户认证**：\n```\nCookie: user (JWT token), userid, username, useremail\n中间件: is-user.ts → checkJWT(secretClient)\n失败码: -400 → 跳转 /\n```\n\n**管理员认证**：\n```\nCookie: b_user (JWT token), b_userid, b_username\n中间件: is-admin.ts → checkJWT(secretServer)\n失败码: -500 → 跳转 `blog-vite-vue3/src/api/index-client.ts` | file 方法添加 config.api 前缀 |\n| `blog-api-ts/src/routes/frontend.ts` | 添加公开的分类 API |\n| `blog-api-ts/src/utils/password.ts` | bcrypt → bcryptjs |\n| `blog-api-ts/package.json` | bcryptjs 替换 bcrypt |\n\n---\n\n### 7.7 验证结果\n\n```bash\n# API 测试\ncurl http://localhost:4000/api/frontend/category/list\n# 返回 {\"code\":200,\"data\":{\"list\":[...]}}
